programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 4
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Vegas Cash Game - Part 1
programme.desc: Big stars and personalities are in Las Vegas to play for hundreds of thousands of dollars and a Hublot watch. Ben Lamb, Kristen Bicknell, and Randall Emmett headline the star-studded lineup at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Vegas Cash Game - Part 2
programme.desc: Big stars and personalities are in Las Vegas to play for hundreds of thousands of dollars and a Hublot watch. Ben Lamb, Kristen Bicknell, and Randall Emmett headline the star-studded lineup at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: ClubWPT Challenge the Champs - Part 1
programme.desc: Two ClubWPT qualifiers square off against WPT Champions Mike Sexton, Darren Elias, David Williams, Scotty Nguyen, and more in Las Vegas in a matchup for the ages of Pro versus Average Joe playing for $50,000.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Gardens Poker Championship - Part 1
programme.desc: This $10,000 event features wild card Frank Stepuchin playing versus top pros looking to win their first WPT title and $548,000! Chicken wings, all-ins, and more, this final table has it all!

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Gardens Poker Championship - Part 2
programme.desc: This $10,000 event features wild card Frank Stepuchin playing versus top pros looking to win their first WPT title and $548,000! Chicken wings, all-ins, and more, this final table has it all!

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Borgata - Part 1
programme.desc: The third-largest field in WPT history of 1,415 players is down to six playing for $728,000 and to get their name on the WPT Champions Cup. Watch tonight at HyperX Esports Arena to see who wins their share of the $4.5 million prize pool.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Borgata - Part 2
programme.desc: The third-largest field in WPT history of 1,415 players is down to six playing for $728,000 and to get their name on the WPT Champions Cup. Watch tonight at HyperX Esports Arena to see who wins their share of the $4.5 million prize pool.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Fair Unknown
programme.desc: Mannskapet redder en av de tapt grunnleggerne av Commonwealth, men oppdager at hun kan være mer trøbbel enn hun er verdt.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dyrets mage
programme.desc: Et mytologisk rommonster prøver å spise Andromeda.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ridderen, døden og djevelen
programme.desc: Dylan prøver å frigjøre en flåte med fangede skip, men flåten er ikke sikker på at den vil bli frigjort. AI-ene deres frykter at nye kapteiner vil slavebinde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Immaculate Perception
programme.desc: Genitter angriper Tyrs kone og koloni.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tunnel ved enden av lyset
programme.desc: Med femti partier ombord er Dylan vert for signeringen av New Commonwealth-charteret, men oppdager snart at det er inntrengere som har til hensikt å stoppe signeringen.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hvis hjulet er løst
programme.desc: Beka og Tyr blir overtatt av energien fra en dimensjonal tunnel. Dylan, Trance og Harper må redde dem før de ødelegger skipet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Skårene i Rimni
programme.desc: Dylan er innrammet for drap og må rydde navnet sitt mens han finner bitene i en vase som sies å gi eieren kosmos 'velsignelser.'

programme.title: Andromeda: Mad to Be Saved
programme.desc: Mannskapet redder en gruppe flyktninger, bare for å oppdage at de har vært utsatt for regjeringseksperimenter og er ekstremt ustabile.

programme.title: Andromeda: Cui Bono
programme.desc: Bekas onkel løper for kontoret i New Commonwealth, men et attentat får mannskapet til å opptre som hans sikkerhet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den ensomme og jevne sanden
programme.desc: Når Andromeda blir angrepet av rompirater, blir de reddet av et langt mistet romskip fra jorden.

programme.title: Andromeda: Slipfighter Hunder av Krig
programme.desc: Mannskapet oppdager at en falsk planet, Marduk, har skapt masseødeleggelsesvåpen.

programme.title: Andromeda: Lepras kyss
programme.desc: En hitman med navnet Leper er rettet mot lederne for det nye samveldet.

programme.title: Andromeda: For hvem bjelleveiene
programme.desc: Andromeda hjemsøkes av en mystisk skapning som kommer ombord under en solstorm.

programme.title: Andromeda: Og ditt hjerte vil fly bort
programme.desc: Når en forlengst mistet kjærlighet kommer tilbake, forsvinner Tyr fra skipet for å beskytte henne mot en snikmorder.
programme.sub-title: Og ditt hjerte vil fly bort

programme.title: Andromeda: Den ukontrable mannen
programme.desc: Sett i et alternativt univers der Dylan døde og Gaheris Rhade prøver å reformere Commonwealth.

programme.title: Andromeda: Delenda Est
programme.desc: Gruppen som angrep Andromeda under den første undertegningen av Commonwealth-charteret, vender tilbake til mer kaos.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Dark Backward
programme.desc: Trance går gjennom noen forskjellige scenarier og prøver å finne en der mannskapet hennes ikke dør.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Risk-All Point
programme.desc: Et kraftigere Andromeda-skip eksploderer på grunn av sannsynlig sabotasje, og tvinger Dylans mannskap til å redde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den rette hesten
programme.desc: Beka setter både mannskapet og en hel planet i fare når en tidligere kjærlighet dukker opp.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hva skjer med en revidert utsatt?
programme.desc: Andromeda mottar et rop om hjelp fra pastor Bam.
programme.sub-title: Hva skjer med en revidert utsatt?

programme.title: Andromeda: Spydspunktet
programme.desc: Etter at en Commonwealth-planet er angrepet av pyriske pyroformere, blir Dylan tvunget til å kjempe for å beskytte den nye planeten.

programme.title: MTV Catfish
programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, 82-year-old Kathryn Bishop was found dead in her Pennsylvania home. Tiny clues on the victim's body would tell police what happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When the number and volume of bloodstains at the scene was greater than usual, it was up to forensic scientists to find out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue ? a flaw on a mailing envelope ? exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Maneuver
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run accident claimed the life of a high school athlete, everyone in town mourned his passing. Finding the killer was a long shot at best.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A murder trail turned cold, until police got a call from a woman whose husband, Gerald Powers, had a criminal past and a fondness for Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: Lives changed in the 20 years following an unsolved murder, and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A lifelong resident of the tiny town of Lefroy, Tasmania was murdered outside his own home. Robbery appeared to be the motive, but with no suspects, the investigation came to a halt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite died after falling down the stairs, witness accounts contradicted evidence. To find out what really happened, investigators employed a physicist and an expert in accident reconstruction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired-Up
programme.desc: In 1996, Derrick Duehren returned to find his Oregon home burned to the ground. His wife's charred remains were later found in the rubble. Investigators set out to determine if it was an unfortunate accident or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family were executed in their own home. For three years, the murders went unsolved. Finally, a 30-year-old box of ammunition and some fluorescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, police quickly arrested the most likely suspect. But cutting-edge technology from NASA enabled a forensic odontologist to prove the wrong man was behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: It's usually easy to determine how a criminal entered the crime scene. But in this case, it looked as if the killer vanished into thin air ? and perhaps he had.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: It was one of the most unusual cases in forensic history. Investigators had to find a way to solve a murder case using only a squashed tomato found at the crime scene and tiny, pinpoint reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: Seattle police had no suspects in the violent murder of grunge singer Mia Zapata. More than a decade passed before evidence collected by a prescient medical examiner could be used by forensic scientists to identify the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A Michigan State University grad student disappeared and was presumed dead. With the help of a professor of geological sciences, police hoped to get the "dirt" on her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: How unlucky could one man be? His college sweetheart killed herself and fourteen years later, his wife ended her life in a similar way. Investigators had to determine if this was murder or simply a bizarre coincidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: The victim had been sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on the beach. A pair of men's tennis shoes was discovered near her body. Police were sure that if they found the man who fit the shoes, they would also find the man who committed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home. The only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence. He turned to law books in the prison library and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death In The Delta
programme.desc: When a wealthy young woman was abducted in front of her in-laws' home, the police had no shortage of suspects. The 25-year-old victim left behind a tumultuous marriage, an ex-husband and old boyfriends. All were on the FBI's short list.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Human Prey
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: In a small Ohio community, an elderly woman and a teenaged boy disappeared. Because they vanished within hours of each other, police believed the cases were linked. But they didn't know how.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brotherhood of Hate
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Mission
programme.desc: When a family was murdered in Arkansas, it seemed like an isolated event. But soon the crime was revealed to be part of an ever-widening circle of violence that defined a new age of domestic terrorism.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Melissa Brannen: Missing
programme.desc: In 1989, residents of a close-knit apartment community in Virginia gathered for a holiday celebration. For Tammy Brannen and five-year-old daughter Melissa, Christmas was always a special time. Then without warning, the little girl was gone.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Temple of Fear
programme.desc: In Miami, the discovery of a mutilated body sent investigators on the trail of a deadly cult. But agents found a wall of silence around the cult's members. Potential witnesses, terrified of reprisals, refused to talk.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Mercy
programme.desc: Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Remorse
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Target
programme.desc: Over a thousand hunting accidents are reported in the United States each year. Fewer than ten percent of them are fatal. But when one hunter's death seemed suspicious, the FBI was called in to investigate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killing Spree
programme.desc: In 1984, in South Florida, a rapist and murderer was on the loose. The killer was a ruthless and terrifying predator, the newest member of an infamous group known as serial killers.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cracking The Cartel
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dead Run
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, an inmate escaped with the help of his female accomplice. Following a trail of fraudulent credit card receipts and deaths, authorities track the pair, but always find themselves one step behind.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dishonored
programme.desc: Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Elements Of Murder
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison. When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly intentions
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written In Bone
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead Men Do Talk
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In The Line of Fire
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Marked For Death
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bloodlust
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Random Targets
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial By Fire
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives: True Crime
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trails of Evidence
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Material Witness
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Unlikely Sources
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tainted Trust
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Family Plots
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murderous Attraction
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Deep in the woods on the outskirts of Liverpool lie the crumbling remains of a forgotten gatehouse — and the land surrounding it is said to be cursed. As Sean and Bex begin their nighttime investigation, unsettling activity begins to unfold.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Sean and Bex head to one of Leeds’ oldest public libraries, where the silence hides more than just books. Reports of shadow figures, unexplained voices, and a terrifying presence in the basement have kept rumours alive for decades.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In the first of a five-part investigation inside the historic Greenfield Valley Heritage Park, the team explores the eerie ruins of the old mills. Known for reports of ghostly children, unexplained footsteps, and phantom knocks on stone walls.
programme.sub-title: Greenfield Valley: Echoes of the Mill : Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: As the team delves deeper into the Valley Mills, subtle sounds begin to stir the silence—unheard by the cameras, but felt by those present. A chilling metallic swing echoes through the empty building with no visible source.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In this chilling third part of our Greenfield Valley investigation, we continue deep within the historic mills—where echoes of the past seem to come alive. With intense K2 meter spikes, disembodied footsteps and unexplained sounds.
programme.sub-title: Whispers of the Forgotten – Greenfield Valley: Part 3

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In the historic heart of Greenfield Valley Mills, Sean and Bex uncover chilling echoes of its industrial past. Once alive with the hum of machinery and the toil of mill workers, the site now stands in eerie silence.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In this chilling investigation, the Ghost Dimension team travel deep into Greenfield Valley to uncover the haunted secrets of Basingwerk Abbey. Once home to Cistercian monks and steeped in centuries of devotion and conflict.
programme.sub-title: Echoes of the Abbey: Hauntings at Greenfield Valley: Part 5

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Halloween Special
programme.desc: Join Bex, Sean and the team as they investigate The Wellington Hotel for Halloween. Based in Halewood, this public inn has more haunting inside of its walls than the spirits behind the bar

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Lady in Grey
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate claims of a ghost lady in grey haunting Windleshaw abbey, St Helens, Merseyside. Over 600 years old and with new paranormal encounters reported almost weekly. Bex and Sean attempt to make contact with the infamous lady in grey.

programme.title: Ghost Dimensions Top 10 Scariest Moments
programme.desc: A special look into the top 10 of Ghost Dimension’s scariest moments. Venturing into the UK’s most haunted buildings, we take a look back at the scariest captures.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Scars for Life
programme.desc: Could a tattoo studio be haunted? Has a Ouija board opened a gateway to the spirit dimension? Ghost Dimension spend the night investigating Deviant Ink tattoo studio.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fort Crosby
programme.desc: Crosby Battery, also known as Crosby Point Battery and Fort Crosby, was an artillery battery situated between Crosby and Hightown in Lancashire, United Kingdom. The battery was used for port defence and anti-aircraft defence during WWII.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Passage in Time
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Big Condo Studios in Liverpool, UK. Located in one of the most haunted cities in the world and believed to be haunted by some very playful spirits. Will they join the team on their investigation tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Poltergeist House
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate a Poltergeist haunting a homeowner who is a wits end. Poltergeistal activity in the home is terrorizing the tenant and paranormal investigators Bex and Sean are about to start the exorcism of this demonic entity away for good.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Whitby Hall
programme.desc: Built in the early 1800s, Whitby Hall used to be an administrative center and now stands as a public park and arts center. It has never before been investigated, but staff have reported many noises and presences among them.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Razor Ruddock's Home
programme.desc: We visit the home of Soccer legend Neil "Razor" Ruddock which seems to be haunted. Is it his home specifically? Or are these ghosts attached to him?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Mill Street Barracks
programme.desc: Built in 1861 Mill Street Barracks is steeped in rich history. It has accommodated many branches of the armed forces throughout its life. Like many other barracks it has also been used as a morgue making it a prime location for the supernatural.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Stranger in the Blitz
programme.desc: Damaged during the blitz, the location the team investigate was a former war hospital for the injured and wounded, based in Liverpool, UK.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Better Not Fail That Test!
programme.desc: Lainie and Justin have a 9-month-old baby together. Justin hurts Lainie because he thinks she’s cheating. But how will Steve react when he confronts Justin?
programme.sub-title: You Better Not Fail That Test!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: How Could You Cover for Him?
programme.desc: Gina believes that her daughter’s boyfriend Efrain is abusing her grandson. Her daughter wants to prove that Efrain is innocent, but her father Raul suspects she is covering for Efrain.
programme.sub-title: How Could You Cover for Him?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who Did This?
programme.desc: Who’s responsible for toddler Noel's well-being? Everyone may deny the allegations, but someone knows what happened, and Steve is getting answers!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
programme.desc: Kendra is on a mission to save herself from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.
programme.sub-title: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Over the Edge
programme.desc: Sheroya is 17 and struggling to raise 2 kids while trying to party all the time. Her boyfriend Malcolm frequently cheats and verbally abuses her. Steve’s got a lot of work ahead with this couple, but will either of them wake up?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed 5 Times?
programme.desc: Did Everett touch his girlfriend Michelle’s daughter? Her ex Robert says that his 7-year-old daughter said so. Everett will take a lie detector test to disprove it! Don’t miss these shocking results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am
programme.desc: Sean says his wife has made him so angry that he’s put her in the hospital over 10 times. Sean’s also got a secret of his own — he is really a she! Can Steve help Sean iron out his issues?
programme.sub-title: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Real Teens: Real Topics
programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off limits!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Rescues a Runaway
programme.desc: Sherry was attacked at 15 and ran away from home. She wants Steve’s help with reuniting her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and unstable father Nick.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?
programme.sub-title: Look What You Did to Your Baby

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Betrayal
programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Did It To Hurt You
programme.desc: Aeshia’s here to prove to Terrence and his wife Lashondra that Terrence is the father of her child, but Lashondra knows she’s wrong! Both Shaunah and Chris have convinced themselves that they’re being cheated on. Who’s the father?
programme.sub-title: I Did It To Hurt You

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Left You, But You Are The Father
programme.desc: Anastasia and Robert's 2 year relationship crumbled when he heard rumors that she was cheating on him. She says that she's always been faithful, but Robert doesn't believe her and now he doubts he is the father of her newborn baby.
programme.sub-title: I Left You, But You Are The Father

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did The Babysitter Abuse My Child?
programme.desc: Stephanie says that ever since she came home from work to find her 1-year-old with a black eye, she has feared that her children's babysitter harms them. Sitter Cheryl denies some serious accusations about a child.
programme.sub-title: Did The Babysitter Abuse My Child?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: We Can't Live Like This
programme.desc: Thornton says he can't trust his cheating girlfriend Crystal and wants her to take a lie detector test! Plus, Stephanie wants to prove to her husband Mathew that she's not having sex with her own family member! She wants the accusations put to rest.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'm Raising Him, But Is He Mine?
programme.desc: Deshawn claims that his ex Lynette abandoned their 5-year-old son. But she claims that he is keeping her from their child. However, Deshawn recently found out that he isn't listed on his son's birth certificate, so he wants a DNA test!
programme.sub-title: I'm Raising Him, But Is He Mine?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Know About the Affair, But Is He the Father?
programme.desc: Stephanie gave birth to a baby boy and believes Brandon is the father. But Brandon claims he didn't find out about the child until three years later and denies being the father. Stephanie and her mother want Brandon to step up.
programme.sub-title: I Know About the Affair, But Is He the Father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Gets The Real Update
programme.desc: Megan wanted to find out if her boyfriend Devin was cheating. But even darker relationship secrets surface! Plus, you'll be shocked to find out why Laura and Steven need Steve's help again!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Falsely Accused of Molestation?
programme.desc: Desmond believes that his ex Cassandra is making up a story about him touching their child because she's jealous of his new fiancée. And later, Tammy has been investigated for child abuse and even accused of locking her kids in a closet.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?
programme.desc: Russell wants to put his family back together after his three children died in a fire. Next, Tatiana believes her 2-year-old nephew was abused. And she's accusing her sister's ex-fiancé Chris. Chris says he's not an abuser.
programme.sub-title: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 13-Year-Old Father?
programme.desc: Curtis sat down with his mother Telisha, and told her that he is trying to have a baby but Telisha was shocked and terrified because Curtis is only 13 years old! Curtis insists he is ready to be a father.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen
programme.desc: Kelsey says her husband is abusing her. Malcolm believes that Kelsey has been cheating on him since the beginning and that their two kids may belong to another man. Plus, Carrie's boyfriend Chris thinks their child belongs to her ex.
programme.sub-title: If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda’s only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Who Took Heather?
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is missing, sending Kenda’s city into a panic. A cryptic letter to the District Attorney’s office suggests the girl isn’t the only victim.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A army vet is found bleeding to death on the asphalt of a parking lot -- his chest littered with too many knife wounds to count. Kenda’s case is stuck in first gear until a gruesome clue appears.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The End
programme.desc: Kenda faces his most difficult case yet – the slaying of a young boy. The detective makes the most consequential decision of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: When the Music Stops
programme.desc: Vietnam War veteran Charles Walker is found unconscious, after a stabbing attack so savage even 45 units of blood couldn’t save his life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Monster Awakes
programme.desc: When Julie Smith reports being sexually assaulted, Lt. Joe Kenda and his Sex Crimes Unit discover a terrifying similarity to other attacks on the east side of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Last Fare
programme.desc: A young man is found dead behind the wheel of his taxi. With robbery seeming unlikely, Kenda and Gaenzle wonder if this was personal.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Kenda finds the body of a bruised and battered young woman named Vicki Ross strangled. Kenda must sort through the endless suspicious characters in Vicki's past to find the elusive truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: City Of Fear
programme.desc: When a spate of violent robberies spreads terror across the city, Kenda and the major crimes unit are called in to bring the masked gunman to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Setup
programme.desc: Douglas Warren stumbles into a downtown bar with a gunshot wound to the neck and bleeds out on the floor. Kenda must conduct a risky sting operation and launch an interstate manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Weight
programme.desc: A seemingly random attack leaves Mary Moebus dead, and police flummoxed by a daunting field of suspects. But when Lt Joe Kenda uncovers a cache of new evidence, he realizes someone’s been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lady in Red
programme.desc: A woman in red drops a dying man off at a firehouse… and then vanishes. Identifying the mystery woman is the hurdle Kenda must overcome in order to bring him justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Follow the Money
programme.desc: The body of a 72-year-old man is found in a junkyard, stabbed 13 times and wearing nothing but his underwear and dentures.

programme.title: The Hills: Once a Player
programme.desc: Lauren mener at Brody er for mye av en playboy til at man bør ta ham alvorlig. Spencers søster forteller ham at Heidi i hemmelighet tviler på om de bør gifte seg.

programme.title: The Hills: When One Door Closes...
programme.desc: Lauren mottar noen spennende nyheter på Teen Vogue og Heidi trenger litt tid borte fra Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills: Paris Changes Everything
programme.desc: Lauren får endelig dra til Paris, men drømmeturen blir nesten ødelagt da hun finner ut at Brody har funnet seg en ny. Spencer følger etter Heidi til Colorado for å vinne henne tilbake, men planen hans slår feil.

programme.title: The Hills: Back to L.A.
programme.desc: Whitney må velge mellom tryggheten i Teen Vogue og risikoen ved å forfølge en ny karriere. Lauren og Brody krangler om hans nye kjæreste, og Heidi tilpasser seg livet uten Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Friend
programme.desc: Lauren får overraskende en venn når Spencers søster Stephanie blir med i hennes moteklasse. Whitney tror den nye jobben er drømmejobben, men en hektisk tur til New York minner henne på å være forsiktig med hva hun ønsker seg.

programme.title: The Hills: When Spencer Finds Out...
programme.desc: Lauren inviterer Stephanie i bursdagsselskapet sitt, men Heidi og Spencer sår tvil om Stephanies lojalitet. Spencer lanserer en plan for å vinne Heidi tilbake.

programme.title: The Hills: Just Be Careful...
programme.desc: Heidi prøver å bli venner med Audrina igjen, men Lauren har sine tvil om Heidis motiver. Whitney tilpasser seg den nye jobben, men oppdager fort at hun savner å jobbe med Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills: Girls' Night Out
programme.desc: Heidi digger singellivet, helt til hun blir sjalu når hun ser Spencer sammen med andre jenter. Whitney ber om Laurens hjelp ved Moteuken i LA, og åpner dermed nye dører for Lauren og hennes karriere.

programme.title: The Hills: A New Roommate
programme.desc: Med Spencer ute av bildet, prøver Heidi en siste gang å bli venner med Lauren igjen. Når Audrina begynner å være mer sammen med Heidi og Justin, spør Lauren seg selv om de egentlig bør fortsette å bo sammen.

programme.title: The Hills: A Date With The Past
programme.desc: En gammel flamme blusser opp når Stephen Coletti dukker opp igjen i Laurens liv. Heidi prøver å hindre Stephanie i å komme på Laurens innflytningsfest.

programme.title: The Hills: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Lauren havner mellom to stoler når spenningen mellom Lo og Audrina stiger. Heidi bestemmer seg for at forholdet til Spencer er over, og aksepterer et jobbtilbud som fører henne til Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Hills: The Next Move Is Yours
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen føler Audrina seg utestengt av Laurens nære vennskap med Lo, og vurderer å flytte ut. Lauren gjør et inderlig forsøk på å reparere forholdet med Audrina, men det kan være for sent.

programme.title: The Hills: We'll Never Be Friends
programme.desc: Når sesong fire starter er situasjonen mellom Audrina og Lo anspent. Lauren forsøker å gjøre et godt inntrykk på en ny fyr, og et besøk fra Heidis søster Holly truer Spencer og Heidis forhold.

programme.title: The Hills: Drama Follows Them
programme.desc: Stephanie blir uvenner med broren sin og kompisen hans når Lauren møter på Spencer på bursdagen sin. Kelly Cutrone sparker noen på People's Revolution og Whitney fyller plassen. Laurens forhold med Doug kanskje går litt for fort fram.

programme.title: The Hills: Better Off As Friends
programme.desc: Lauren innser at kjemien hun hadde med Doug på videregående, ikke lenger er der. Whitney er nervøs for å dra til New York for jobben, men en date med en kjekk modell hjelper på humøret. Til tross for en fin gest vil Spencer bryte helt med Stephanie.

programme.title: The Hills: Boys Make Girls Cry
programme.desc: En heidundrende tur til Las Vegas går galt når Audrina ignorerer Lauren. Brody tar opp Stephanies fortid, og gutta ender opp i fengsel. Heidis søster Holly flytter inn, men det er lite Spencer heller vil enn å sparke henne ut.

programme.title: The Hills: Something Has To Change
programme.desc: Lauren og Audrina kjemper for å redde vennskapet sitt, men det kan allerede være for sent. Spencer har fått nok av Heidis søster Holly og tar saken i egne hender. Og Brody og Doug forlater fengslet med noe nytt å fortelle.

programme.title: The Hills: You Always Miss a Best Friend
programme.desc: Heidis søster Holly tar kontakt med Lauren, noe som tvinger både Lauren og Heidi til å revurdere hva som skjedde med vennskapet deres. Audrina og Justins forhold blir satt på prøve når hun jobber på en stor begivenhet for Epic Records.
programme.sub-title: You Always Miss a Best Friend

programme.title: The Hills: When Lauren's Away...
programme.desc: Når Lauren drar på ferie med familien, ting går galt i Los Angeles. Stephanie dater Doug bak Laurens rygg, og Audrina og Heidi blir venner.

programme.title: The Hills: Don't Act Innocent
programme.desc: Sannheten om Stephanies forhold til Laurens eks Doug kommer til slutt fram når de alle møtes på Dougs poolparty. Heidis mor kommer overraskende på besøk til LA og havner i en konfrontasjon med Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills: If She Never Met Spencer...
programme.desc: Lauren får et brev fra Heidi hvor hun beklager og innser at det er bare én ting som hindrer dem fra å bli venner igjen. Audrina starter å date en ny fyr for å gjøre Justin sjalu, men planen går feil.

programme.title: The Hills: Who To Choose?
programme.desc: Audrina møter sin gamle flamme Corey igjen og sjonglerer plutselig to gutter. Spencer tvinger Heidi til å sparke ut søsteren hennes Holly fra leiligheten.

programme.title: The Hills: You'll Never Have This
programme.desc: Lauren og Audrina reiser til Cabo for Brody bursdag, men når Justin blir sjalu av Audrinas nye forhold, blir festen en slåsskamp. Spencer ydmyker Stephanie etter å funnet ut at hennes nye kjæreste er venn med Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: I Want You To Be With Me
programme.desc: Lauren prøver å skape fred mellom Brody og Stephanie. Audrina ønsker å få ting til å fungere med Corey, men Justin vil ikke gi slipp på henne. Stephanie tviler på sin nye kjæreste etter at han bryter sitt løfte om å stå opp mot Brody.
programme.sub-title: I Want You To Be With Me

programme.title: The Hills: It's Her Move
programme.desc: Audrina får sitt eget sted, og håper at Justin vil flytte inn hos henne, men alle frykter at hun flytter av feil grunn. Heidi inviterer Spencer til et arrangement med jobben, og blir tatt i å ha litt for mye moro.

programme.title: The Hills: Back To New York
programme.desc: Whitney reiser til New York og den nye gutten Jay stjeler oppmerksomheten hennes. Heidi er nedfor etter å ha fått sparken, og da Spencer snakker med Brent for å få jobben hennes tilbake, gjør han bare situasjonen verre.

programme.title: The Hills: One Last Chance
programme.desc: Lauren lar Heidis søster sove over hos seg. Justin ber Audrina med på tur for en romantisk helg, og Heidis frustrasjon med Spencer vokser etter at hun må tigge for å få jobben tilbake.

programme.title: The Hills: You Did This
programme.desc: Audrina tror på et rykte hun hører: at Lauren har rotet med Justin. I mellomtiden prøver Holly å få Heidi bort fra Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills: It's About Trust
programme.desc: Audrina forsøker å redde vennskapet med Lauren etter å ha anklaget henne for å rote med Justin. Spencer og Stephanie besøker bestemoren deres, som er lei av at de krangler.

programme.title: The Hills: Dream Boy, Dream Job
programme.desc: Whitney blir tilbudt drømmejobben i NYC og håper å få møte Jay der. Lauren blir nostalgisk da foreldrene selger huset i Laguna Beach, og Stephanie ber Spencer om hjelp da hun ikke klarer å bestemme seg for hva hun skal gjøre med Cameron.

programme.title: The Hills: Mr. & Mrs. Pratt
programme.desc: Spencer og Heidi ignorerer bekymringene til sine familier og stikker av til Mexico for å gifte seg. Whitney tar en sjanse på drømmejobben i New York City, og sier farvel til Lauren og sitt liv i Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Hills: I Heidi Take Thee Spencer
programme.desc: Lauren og Heidi møter på hverandre, og husker hvorfor de pleide å være venner. Spencer og Heidi har akkurat giftet seg da Heidis mor kommer til byen. Justin sjokkerer Audrina når han tar henne til Palm Springs for en overraskelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Don't Cry On Your Birthday
programme.desc: Når Heidi kommer til overraskelsesfesten på bursdagen til Lauren, gråter de to gamle vennene for vennskapet som har gått i oppløsning. Spencer starter en voldelig nevekamp når Cameron anklager ham for å ha plukket opp en bartender.

programme.title: The Hills: Everything Happens for a Reason
programme.desc: Spencers sjarm fører Heidi hjem til Colorado, der gjenopptar hun kontakten med en gammel flamme. Lauren forteller Stephanie hva hun syns om at Heidi kom i bursdagsselskapet. Spencer snakker med Brody igjen etter en lang tids taushet.

programme.title: The Hills: I'm Done With You
programme.desc: Etter at Heidi tar Spencer på fersken på en nattklubb med bartenderen Stacie, krever hun at de skal gå i parterapi. Lauren setter ryktet sitt på spill når hun skaffer Stephanie en praktikantplass hos People's Revolution.

programme.title: The Hills: Crazy In Love
programme.desc: Audrina forsøker å komme over Justin ved å kaste sitt blikk på Brody i stedet. Heidi sleper en motvillig Spencer til parterapi. Når Stephanie går i baret hos People's Revolution, truer Lauren med å sparke henne.

programme.title: The Hills: I Always Had A Little Crush
programme.desc: Når jentene krasjer guttenes Hawaii tur, prøver Valeria å glemme Justin ved å flørte med Brordy. Heidis ekskjæreste, som er jomfru, kommer på besøk og Heidi håper at Spenser skal lære noe av eksens verdier.
programme.sub-title: I Always Had A Little Crush

programme.title: The Hills: Playmates Bring the Drama
programme.desc: Audrina fortviler når Brodys kjæreste konfronterer henne med Hawaii, og Brody gjør ingenting for å stoppe det. Heidi oppdager en tekstmelding fra Stacie til Spencer og drar til nattklubben for å konfrontere henne med det.

programme.title: The Hills: Hi Lauren, It's Spencer
programme.desc: Lauren er usikker på om hun skal gå i Heidis bryllup etter at Spencer endelig har bedt om unnskyldning. Brody nekter å risikere forholdet sitt til Jayde for å redde vennskapet med Audrina, og Stephanie konfronterer Kelly Cutrone.

programme.title: The Hills: Something Old, Something New
programme.desc: I Laurens siste episode må hun bestemme om hun er villig til å tilgi Spencer for å kunne stille opp for Heidi i hennes "prinsesse"-bryllup. Hele besetningen dukker opp og blir overrasket over en gjest ingen tenkte ville komme.

programme.title: The Hills: It's On Bitch
programme.desc: Kristin starter krig når hun forsøker seg på Justin foran Audrina. Spencer og Heidi leter etter hus, og Spencer kjøper et hus uten Heidis godkjennelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Mess With Me, I Mess With You
programme.desc: Etter at Audrina ikke dukket opp, bestemmer Kristin seg for ikke å kjempe mot sine følelser for Justin. Heidi melder seg som barnevakt for naboen, men Spencer vil ikke ha noe med unger å gjøre.
programme.sub-title: Mess With Me, I Mess With You

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Loose Lips
programme.desc: Michael Goonans hemmelige oppdrag avsløres i hemmelighullet, men kan sladderen bite ham i ræva. En eks betyr problemer for Kori, og Ella og KC får grønt lys fra Kaz.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: True Colours
programme.desc: Michael Goonan sender hjem noen, og blir så urolig for sin egen besøkelsestid. KC syns stadig det er vanskelig å være med Theo når Kaz er der. Nathan tar farvel med Tommy før han blir sendt til stranden for å ta imot den neste eksen.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Kori Gets the Hump
programme.desc: Lockie og Megan deler sitt første kyss. Kori blir forvirret av Sofies doble signaler. Nathan frykter at Declan kan ombestemme seg.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Double Whammy
programme.desc: Kori og Lockie rammes av dobbel motgang, og SOS betyr trøbbel for kjendisene. Nathans usikkerhet blir en fordel, og Mike blir overrasket.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Theo's 'Down Under' Dilemma
programme.desc: Theo er knust etter at Kaz dro, og hans forhold med KC tilspisser seg. Lockie og Sofie krangler, og en ny eks gir oppstyr.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Cherry On The Cake
programme.desc: Anya liker Kori, men er Kori ferdig med Sofie? En splitter ny kjendis attraherer noen. OG-ene i villaen må fatte et tøft valg. Og en Pride-fest avslører en gullkrukke der regnbuen slutter.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Going Going Gone!
programme.desc: En eks som truer med å endre Megan, ankommer. Kris avslører sine følelser for Ella. Kori og Sofie har en real styrkeprøve. Nathan må fatte en stor avgjørelse når tiden til en OG er over!

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Finale!
programme.desc: Nok en eks truer to av kjendisparene. SOS leverer sin endelige sexbombe. Den siste middagen gir en stor overraskelse. Blir det en lykkelig slutt eller ender alt i tårer?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Paradise From Hell
programme.desc: 10 realitykjendiser tror de er på en sexy heisatur, men paradiset blir et mareritt når eksene deres begynner å dukke opp fra stranden (utover andre overraskelser) for å ødelegge hyggen. Tennes gamle flammer eller åpnes gamle sår?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Being Shady 101
programme.desc: Den tiende single ankommer huset og lander midt i et trekantdrama. Farrah irriterer de hun bor sammen med. En eks sprer et skittent rykte når sårede følelser forvandles til hevngjerninger.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Simon Says
programme.desc: Farrah får en stor overraskelse i Shack of Secrets. En eks til en eks ruinerer en spirende romanse og avslører noen løgner. Den første eksen sendes hjem.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Worst Date Ever
programme.desc: To ekser slår seg sammen for å knuse Maya og gjengen hennes. En uventet overraskelse setter et av husets sterkeste par i fare.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: 8 sexy single håper å finne kjærligheten på en paradisstrand. Men det er en hake, for drømmeferien ødelegges når ekskjærestene deres dukker opp, en etter en. Noen for å få hevn, andre for å få forholdet til å blusse opp igjen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Drømmeferien der 8 single leter etter kjærlighet fortsetter å få sand i maskineriet. Vicky fortsetter sin romanse med Ross. Marcos eks, Frankie, oppdager at hun har en rival. Ash og Chloe kommer til å få seg litt av et sjokk når neste eks dukker opp.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Den fjerde ekskjæresten kommer til stranda og skaper mere trøbbel for de single: Ross får føle Chloes vrede når hans forhold til Vicky utvikler seg. Mellom Taitha og Ash går det for seg og Marco og Frankie når bristepungtet med Emily.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Den femte ekskjæresten ankommer stranden for å overraske Vicky og Ross. Ting blir verre for Talitha og en sjokkerende avreise etterlater alle i panikk for hvilken eks som er den neste til å ankomme.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Ash kunne ikke bli mer sjokkert når den sjette eksen kommer. Emily og Liam drar på daten fra helvete. Farah blir forelsket. Talitha blir redd når en velbevart hemmelighet truer med å bli kjent og ødelegge forholdet til Ash for alltid.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Ross sier til sin eks Chloe at han ønsker å prøve på nytt, og Jack prøver med Emily. Ashs verden forandrer seg når Joss avslører det hemmelige kysset med Talitha, og selvsagt dukker enda en eks opp på stranden.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Ash og Talitha har så vidt rukket å slå opp før han kliner med Chloe. Shelby og Ross kommer nærmere hverandre når de overnatter på en kirkegård. Vicky eks kommer, som hun har gruet seg til, og alt tar av på stranden.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Når Vickys andre eks, Ricci, dukker opp, deles gruppa. Ash klikker på Liam med alvorlige konsekvenser. Dan truer med å klikke på Ricci, og Ricci og Vicky prøver på å få en slags avslutning med liten suksess.
programme.sub-title: Liam's Final Stir Of The Pot

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Zahida Wages War
programme.desc: Åtte sexy single folk oppdager at drømmen om sommerkjærlighet blir til et mareritt når flere ekser kommer for å skape kaos. Zahida kriger med Maisie om Sean, men det er når den første eksen ankommer at det virkelige blodbadet skjer.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: A Sea Of Tears
programme.desc: Det koker i villaen når ikke bare en, men tre ekser ankommer og skaper kaos for turtelduene Ross og Harriette. Zahidas eks Joe mister kontrollen og Alex truer med å drukne seg i tårer.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Harriette's Love Triangle
programme.desc: Singlenes elendighet fortsetter når Sean hopper fra Zahida til Zaralena, og Harriettes kjærlighetstrekant blir verre. Maisie vil at noe skal skje og Aaron fra Geordie Shore gjør spektakulær entré, men hvem av eksene er hans?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Nicole's Nightmare
programme.desc: Det blir spent i villaen når Zaralena får kjenne på Zahidas vrede. Den nye eksen får gutta til å oppføre seg eiersyke. Josh har et godt øye til Nicole, men tar det slutt når hun oppdager en grusom hemmelighet?

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: iCarly: Rampestreker
programme.desc: Når hun blir ertet for aldri å ha funnet på en morsom spøk, rekrutterer Carly Spencer for å spøke med Sam og Freddie. Men etter at Spencer har fått sansen for det, kan han ikke slutte. Mob må finne en måte å stoppe ham på.

programme.title: iCarly: Moren til Sam
programme.desc: Etter å ha kranglet ned moren sin, flytter Sam inn til Carly, som snart innser at hun er en fryktelig gjest. Freddie blir forfulgt av en farlig kriminell etter å ha fanget ham på film da han begikk en forbrytelse.

programme.title: iCarly: Nevel trenger hjelp
programme.desc: Når en video av Nevel, som skriker til en liten jente, dukker opp på internett, blir Nevel hatet av alle. Men Nevel trygler iCarly-gjengen om hjelp for å redde sin ære.

programme.title: iCarly: Den kjekke assistenten
programme.desc: Carly og Sam ansetter en kjekk fyr som praktikant på nettshowet.

programme.title: iCarly: iOMG
programme.desc: Gjengen tilbringer kvelden med å fullføre sine prosjekter ved Ridgeway under den årlige skole-innlåsingen. Carly og Freddie mistenker at Sam er forelsket i sin nye venn Brad.

programme.title: iCarly: iParty med Victorious
programme.desc: Carly mistenker at den nye typen hennes, Steven, er utro med Tori Vega, så gjengen planlegger en tur til Los Angeles for å ta ham på fersken på en fest som Andre holder i Kenan Thompsons hus.

programme.title: iCarly: Datehjelpen
programme.desc: Carly trår til for å løse en krangel mellom Sam og Freddie. Snart kommer Freddie og Sam til Carly for å få hjelp med hver eneste krangel. Nå som hun har involvert seg, hvordan kan Carly trekke seg ut av det igjen?

programme.title: iCarly: Det holder
programme.desc: Mrs Benson oppdager Sam og Freddies forhold etter at Gibby - som nå er mål for Sams hevn - har lagt planer om å splitte dem. Kommer Carly til å slåss for Sam og Freddie, eller hjelpe Gibby med å få dem til å gå fra hverandre?

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg elsker deg
programme.desc: Carly ber Sam og Freddie om å prøve hverandres yndlingshobbier. I mens treffer Spencer på sin gamle barnevakt og ber henne ut på middag. Etter at de har falt inn i sine gamle roller igjen, kommer de fortsatt til å kunne være sammen?

programme.title: iCarly: iQ
programme.desc: Carly vil imponere en ny fyr ved å prøve å virke smartere enn hun er. Og gjengen prøver å finne et nytt sted å bo til T-Bo, etter at han har blitt kastet ut av Groovy Smoothie.

programme.title: iCarly: Møtet med førstedamen
programme.desc: Et føderalt bureau begynner å undersøke iCarly-gjengen etter at de hacker seg inn på et sikkerhetsnettverk for å holde nettfødselsdag for Carlys far. Gjestestjerne - Michelle Obama.

programme.title: iCarly: Billetten
programme.desc: Gjengen, minus Carly, tar med Sam til Canadian Fat Cake-fabrikken, men oppdager så at Sam ikke får komme tilbake inn i USA. I mens får Carly bekymringer i badekaret når hun gjør seg klar til daten sin.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Yakima
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt disset i et intervju om iCarly, prøver Freddie å vise sin kreative side gjennom å webb-sende iCarly i 3D. Spencer ansetter en assistent som han ikke har råd til å betale.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: Christopher Cane, skuespilleren som spiller Rex on Victorious, venner tilbake som vert i et dyptgående intervju med stjernerne fra iCarly og viser deres supergøyale tabber og bortklipte scener. Gjestestjerne: Rex fra Victorious

programme.title: iCarly: Fortsatt like gal
programme.desc: Ettr å ha fått beskjed om at Nora Dershlit blir løslatt fra fengselet, ser iCarly-gjengen på hva de kan gjøre for å holde sin gamle kidnapper bak lås og slå. Imens oppdager Freddies mor den virkelige T-Bo.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly møter One Direction
programme.desc: Carly får en smittsom sykdom og kommer til å smitte et medlem i bandet One Direction. I mens skal Spencer trene en liten jente som ikke kan fordra å morsjonere.

programme.title: iCarly: Restauranten
programme.desc: Gibby åpner en hemmelig restaurant i skolens kjeller med Sams hjelp. Og Spencer designer en sikkerhetsrobot til hjemmebruk, som plutselig mister fokus helt.

programme.title: iCarly: Aprilsnarr
programme.desc: I dette spesielle aprilsnarr-avsnittet blir Carly og Spencer satt på gaten, så gjengen sitter og tenker tilbake på sin tid i Bushwell Plaza. Men minnene deres stemmer kanskje ikke alltid helt med hvordan vi husker hendelsene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dårlig stemning i butikken
programme.desc: Freddies nye drømmejobb i Pear Store blir et mareritt når Sam også blir ansatt. Imens prøver Carly å bli inviteret ut av en fra Pear Store, og Spencer må melde seg til frivillig jobb på den lokale brannstasjonen.

programme.title: iCarly: Halloween
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen holder en "Halfoween"-fest, for de syns at det skal være Halloween to ganger i året. Men da en forkledd gjest spiller Carly og vennene et puss, blir festen litt for vill.

programme.title: iCarly: Chucks lillebror
programme.desc: Et sinna barn ønsker inderlig å hevne seg, men målskiven Spencer prøver iherdig å stoppe ham. Gibby blir knust når hans nye lekelaserpistol går i stykker, men blir fra seg av henrykkelse når Freddies reparsjion gir den overraskende krefter.

programme.title: iCarly: Utestengt
programme.desc: Når Carly bannlyser T-Bo fra hennes og Spencers hjem, hevner han seg ved å ikke slippe Carly inn på Groovy Smoothie. Imens oppdager Freddie og Gibby at det fins mange fordeler ved å spille i band...og også et par ulemper.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Las Vegas
programme.desc: Når Sam får vite at moren hennes er i fengsel i Vegas, bestemmer gjengen seg for å ta sine mest verdifulle eiendeler, kjøre til Vegas og pantsette dem - så de får nok penger til å betale borgen for henne. Gjesteartister: History Channels PAWN STARS.

programme.title: iCarly: Nattsynbrillene
programme.desc: Sams venn kommer ut av ungdomsfengselet, og Sam advarer alle om å holde seg unna, men Carly hører ikke etter og havner på dypt vann. Hjemme i leiligheten finner Spencer noen nattsynbriller.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 1
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York. De elsker New York og er kjempeglade for å være med i programmet, men alt kan skje på live tv.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 2
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York, men en stor klesmiss fra Gibby betyr store problemer for nettshowets fremtid.

programme.title: iCarly: Spencers venner
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen vil finne venner til Spencer på hans egen alder. De finner noen gode muligheter, men vil vennskapet blomstre?

programme.title: iCarly: Den stjålne laptoppen
programme.desc: Når Sams laptop blir stjålet, prøver iCarly-gjengen å hjelpe henne med å oppspore tyven. Imens får Spencer vite at han ikke får komme inn i sin yndlingsspillehall hvis han ikke er i følge med et barn. Hellet snur når Guppy trenger barnevakt.

programme.title: iCarly: Farvel del 2
programme.desc: Carly er på vei til å akseptere at hun ikke kan gå på det årlige ballet, da faren hennes dukker opp og går sammen med henne. Kvelden tar en uventet vending når faren hennes stiller et livsavgjørende spørsmål.

programme.title: iCarly: Vårt eget webshow
programme.desc: Når Miss Briggs avviser alle yndlingsdeltagerne deres fra uttakene til talenshowet, bestemmer Carly og Sam seg for å lage sitt eget talentshow for klassekameratene gjennom iCarly på nettet.

programme.title: iCarly: Herr Nesten Perfekt
programme.desc: Carly er keen på en gutt på skolen som heter Jake. Han er råkul og kjekk, og fordi hun liker ham, inviterer hun Jake til å spille gitar og synge på sitt nye webshow. Men hun oppdager forsent at Jake synger helt forferdelig.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ha flere seere
programme.desc: Carly og Sam konkurrerer med Freddie og Spencer om å finne den beste planen for hvordan å få flere ungdommer til å se på iCarlys websendinger. Når alle planene deres slår helt feil, blir alt helt sprøtt.

programme.title: iCarly: En pågående kritiker
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie vil at web-showet deres skal bli anmeldt av 'Nevelocity', en populær webside for slike anmeldelser. Carly drar for å møte Nevel, og det viser seg at han er en irriterende gutt som vil date henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil bli hos Spencer
programme.desc: Bestefaren til Carly og Spencer kommer på overraskelsesvisitt. Han tror at Spencer er for uansvarlig til å passe på Carly. Carly og vennene hennes må bevise overfor bestefaren at Spencer er i stand til det.

programme.title: iCarly: Rekordforsøket
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å slå verdensrekorden for den lengste sammenhengende nettvideovisningen. For å klare det, må iCarly gå i over 24 timer i ett kjør.

programme.title: iCarly: En date med Freddie
programme.desc: Valerie er iCarly-fan og ber Freddie på date. Daten går så bra at Freddie begynner å filme Valeries eget webshow. Men når hennes webshow kommer i veien for iCarly, får Freddie problemer.

programme.title: iCarly: En lidenskapelig amatør
programme.desc: Carly inviterer Spencers kunsthelt, Harry Joyner, for å se på Spencers arbeid. Når Harry kaller Spensers ting amatørmessige, føler Spencer at livet har mistet all mening.

programme.title: Totally Turtles
programme.desc: Cowabunga! Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles kommer rett fra kloakken og er klare til å kjempe mot både fremmede og mutante fiender. Ta en pizza og gjør deg klar for maksimal Turtle Power!
