programme.title: Made: Boxer
programme.desc: Cheerleading princess Erin wants to get tough by becoming a burley boxer. Can boxing trainer Kenny Porter get Erin ready to fight in the showcase of the stars in just 5 weeks?

programme.title: Made: Rockstar
programme.desc: Obsessively organized Jessica wants to show that she can let loose by being MADE into a rockstar.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Jacqueline and Lauren are really close friends, and have their joint party at The Hard Rock Cafe. Will their over-the-top party live up to the expectations of them and their hundreds of guests?

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Ava has a taste for the finer things in life. Only the best of the best will do for her Arabian Night Sweet 16.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Natalie's just moved from sleepy Roswell. This new girl figures planning the biggest bash LA Jolla has ever seen will put her on the map with the kids at school.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Sierra (daughter singer/producer of Cee-Lo) is a little diva who wants what she wants, which includes having a Sweet 15 party so she can be the first among her friends to celebrate their coming of age.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Mandy Moore, Eliza Dushku, Todd Oldham, Oscar de la Joya, Ashton Kutcher
programme.desc: Eliza Dushku is mistaken for a shoplifter. Mandy Moore & Todd Oldham do a little bit of crib crashing - literally! Oscar De La Hoya steps into the ring for some Punk'd style rounds.
programme.sub-title: Mandy Moore, Eliza Dushku, Todd Oldham, Oscar de la Joya, Ashton Kutcher

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Jessica Alba, Wilmer Valderama, Tom Arnold, Ashton
programme.desc: Jessica Alba is tormented by a naked shopper, thinking that the SUV belongs to Ashton, a jealous boyfriend in a love triangle feud destroys Wilmer Valderrama's SUV and Tom Arnold drops off his brat kid with Ashton's newly hired assistant.
programme.sub-title: Jessica Alba, Wilmer Valderama, Tom Arnold, Ashton

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Kevin Richardson (Backstreet Boys), Seth Greene
programme.desc: The Backstreet Boys' Kevin & Trishelle from Real World Las Vegas get caught in building security. Seth Green gets stung when Ashton's celeb craps game gets raided. Punk'd takes over a tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Jessica Biel, Jessica Simpson, Nick Lachey
programme.desc: Charges are threatened on unsuspecting Jessica Biel when she agrees to watch a fan's kid, Jessica Simpson's long-lost relatives show up on her doorstep asking for money and customers are treated badly by valets when they come to pick up their cars.
programme.sub-title: Jessica Biel, Jessica Simpson, Nick Lachey

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ryan O'Malley
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo og Chanel viser sinnssykt morsomme Redneck Good Times, Nutflix og Double Whammies. Ryan O'Malley, hoppestokkmester, viser frem sportens gode og dårlige sider, og du får se hvorfor du aldri bør snu ryggen til en lama!

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Johnny Knoxville
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville hjelper Rob med å presentere Makeshift Ramps, Freak Beasts og Poorly Placed Kid, og du får vite hvorfor fugler aldri er dine venner, spesielt ikke om de har nebb lange nok til å nå hjernen din gjennom nesa!

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Big Black
programme.desc: Robs tidligere medspiller Big Black slutter seg til panelet og ser på Makeshift Thrill Rides, Bieber Hair og Coming in Hot. Se hvordan menneske-skorpioner stikker på en helt annen måte enn edderkoppen som angriper en uskyldig far.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Travis Pastrana
programme.desc: Motorsportsstjernen Travis Pastrana hjelper Rob med å presentere Poorly Placed Trees og Whiskey Throttles. Rob viser deg Pastranabees og Animals Being Human, og du får sjansen til å eksplodere av latter av Butt Bottle Rocket.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Farrah tilkaller politiet etter en heftig krangel med moren. Amber lurer på om hun er gravid, og dermed kan glemme å fullføre skolegangen. Maci saksøker Ryan for å få barnebidrag, og Catelynn må flytte ut av huset til kjæresten Tyler.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynn risikerer å miste kjæresten, mens Ambers kjæreste sier at han kanskje vil forlate henne. Farrah balanserer college, ny jobb, og å bo alene med datteren. Maci innser at hun ikke kan bo sammen med både venner og babyen.
programme.sub-title: Should I Stay or Should I Go?

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Secret Life of Paige Birgfeld
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
programme.sub-title: The Secret Life of Paige Birgfeld

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: A report on the 1979 disappearance of Etan Patz, a 6-year-old New York City boy who was allowed to walk to the school bus stop just two blocks from his home; and the case against Pedro Hernandez, the man charged in 2012 with killing him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: My Name is Victoria
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
programme.sub-title: Live to Tell: My Name is Victoria

programme.title: 48 Hours: Student of Murder
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Deadline for Justice
programme.desc: A report on the cold cases of two young women, both new to the areas where they lived, who were both raped and murdered.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: A report featuring an exclusive interview with Tracey Grissom, who is on trial for the murder of her former husband, Hunter Grissom. Tracey details the abuse she claims to have suffered and the events that led her to shoot and kill him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mandy Stavik: The Case No One Could Forget
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
programme.sub-title: Mandy Stavik: The Case No One Could Forget

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Family's Honor
programme.desc: In October of 2009, 20-year-old Noor Almaleki and Amal Khalaf, the mother of her boyfriend Marwan, walked out of a Peoria, Arizona DES office and were struck by an SUV driven by Noor's father and Iraqi immigrant, Faleh Hassan Almaleki.

programme.title: 48 Hours: An Invisible Enemy
programme.desc: It was February 2002 when Cynthia Sommer, her husband, Marine Sgt. Todd Sommer, and their four children were coming home from a family weekend at an amusement park.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: A report on the events that led to the 2012 death of Lizzi Marriott, a 19-year-old New Hampshire woman lured into the dark world of BDSM and who twice refused to take part in S&M sex with her co-worker Kat McDonough and her boyfriend Seth Mazzaglia.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A young banker named David Harmon was bludgeoned to death in his bed. Investigators came to believe that Melinda was involved in a secret affair with family friend Mark Mangelsdorf, and that the two were involved in David’s murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: A report on the disappearance of Jeanette Louise Zapata, who mysteriously vanished without a trace from her home in Wisconsin on October 11, 1976, leaving behind her daughter Linda, and two other children.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed the Beauty Queen?
programme.desc: In 2005, a college student and aspiring beauty queen Nona Dirksmeyer was found murdered inside her apartment. Police believed Nona's boyfriend flew into a murderous rage when he discovered a condom wrapper on her kitchen counter.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Peace, Love and Murder
programme.desc: A report on the murder of housewife Toni Heartsong, killed in her Jupiter, Florida home on in 2000. Her husband was initially eliminated as a possible suspect, but in 2006, new DNA technology revealed the presence of his blood under Toni's thumbnail.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Vegas Heat
programme.desc: A report on the 2005 discovery of the charred corpse of a young woman, found in a burned-out car on a Las Vegas desert road. The car was registered to Kelly Ryan, a fitness champion who is married to Craig Titus, a Mr. Olympia competitor.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Peter Chadwick: Caught
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Betrayal
programme.desc: A report on the September 3, 2006 disappearance of Nina Reiser, a Russian doctor who had married Hans Reiser, an American computer whiz. Their marriage began to fall apart and Nina began an affair with Sean Sturgeon, Hans' best friend.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Jayme Closs: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: Jayme Closs' story captured the world's hearts when she disappeared from her family's home in Barron, Wisconsin on October 15, 2018. She fled her captor 88 days later.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Troubling Case Against Kevin Cooper
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
programme.sub-title: The Troubling Case Against Kevin Cooper

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Decoy
programme.desc: Phelps falls in love with a woman that the IMF has been assigned to bring out of an iron curtain country over the seemingly insurmountable obstacles set in their way by the country's secret police in the "Decoy"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Flight
programme.desc: John Colicos guest stars as a rebellious Caribbean government official, who plans to take over his country by having his president assassinated while in the United States to speak before a joint session of Congress

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Hunted
programme.desc: While rescuing an imprisoned patriot, Barney is critically wounded and must be left behind in order for the IMF to complete their mission in the "Hunted" episode of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Amateur
programme.desc: Before the IMF can get the prototype of an Iron Curtain country's secret weapon to the United States, part of the weapon falls into the hands of an unscrupulous, greedy nightclub owner, in "The Amateur"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Catafalque
programme.desc: With the threat of another off-shore missile crisis and perhaps a confrontation that could lead to war, the IMF is called upon to expose a nuclear arms treaty secretly signed by a previously friendly country and a hostile power in "The Catafalque"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Squeeze Play
programme.desc: A leading illegal supplier of heroin is dying of cancer and is about to designate a successor and turn over to him the only known list containing all the vital information about the entire drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Merchant
programme.desc: George Sanders guest stars, one of the world's largest dealers in illegal arms, who is about to complete a deal involving guerilla groups in North Africa and the Middle East in "The Merchant"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Cat's Paw
programme.desc: Hari Rhodes guest stars as George Corley, an underworld leader whose link with a police precinct chief is the object of Barney's brother's newspaper crusade in "Cat's Paw"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Hostage
programme.desc: Paris, still in his cover from a completed mission, is kidnapped and held hostage by a group of treacherous revolutionists in "The Hostage" on Paramount Television's award-winning series "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Takeover
programme.desc: A political boss hires a professional provocateur to stage a violent protest, in a maneuver to discredit his state's governor and elevate his puppet, the mayor, to the governorship in "Takeover"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Missile
programme.desc: The IMF devises an elaborate scheme to dupe foreign agent James Reed into stealing a bogus missile guidance system in "The Missile"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blast
programme.desc: Henry Darrow guest stars as Gregory Tolan, the local leader of a revolutionist group specializing in robberies for the financing of a movement to overthrow the United States government in the "Blast"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: A Ghost Story
programme.desc: Andrew Duggan guest stars as Justin Bainbridge, a multimillionaire paranoid militarist, whose son, Howard, defected behind the Iron Curtain with the formula to a lethal nerve gas he had developed in "A Ghost Story"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Party
programme.desc: The whereabouts of a list of enemy agents operating in the United States are locked in the memory of a captured spy, Col. Vanin (guest star Frank Marth), and no one, including the spy, can penetrate his mind in "The Party"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blind
programme.desc: An F.B.I. man is blinded while investigating a crime syndicate attempting to take over a large chemical plant. Jim Phelps undergoes a delicate eye operation so as to appear convincingly blind when he poses as the sightless man.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encore
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as an aging hoodlum who is artificially transplanted back to the 1930s and the scene of his unsolved crime.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Tram
programme.desc: The leaders of two underworld factions call a top-level meeting at a ski resort to set up a financial holding company capable of creating chaos within the national economy.

programme.title: Vendepunktet
programme.desc: Vincent blir separert fra sin vakre, men reserverte kone, og er utro med en blid og lidenskapelig skribent. Kjærligheten hennes lover en ny begynnelse, men Vincent slites mellom de to kvinnene, så hans fremtidige lykke står på spill.

programme.title: Tamara Drewe
programme.desc: Den unge journalisten Tamara Drewe vender tilbake til sine røtter på den engelske landsbygda for å selge sitt barndomshjem etter at hennes mor dør. Hennes ankomst skaper mildt sagt en hel del uro i byen.

programme.title: 10 Things we should do before we break up
programme.desc: Den kvelden da Abigail, enslig mor til to små barn, møter Ben på en bar, lager de på fleip en liste over ting å gjøre før et tenkt brudd, enda de godt vet at de aldri kommer til å innlede noe forhold engang.

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny
programme.desc: Pfeiffer spiller Frankie, en servitrise som jobber på en kaffebar i New York. Etter en rekke vonde forhold er en ny mann det siste Frankie ser etter... helt til en kommer og ser etter henne.

programme.title: The Rewrite
programme.desc: Keith Michaels vant priser for manuset sitt til filmen "Paradise Misplaced". Men han holder på å bli vraket i Hollywood og blir derfor tvunget til å ta en jobb han hater for å få sitt gjennombrudd: Han må undervise.

programme.title: Love on Repeat
programme.desc: Amber er nylig separert og mindre av alt. Fast bestemt på at dette er nok, bestemmer hun seg for å finne noe som kan gjøre henne glad igjen.

programme.title: Can You Keep a Secret?
programme.desc: Emma tror de skal krasje og forteller alle sine hemmeligheter til en fremmed på flyet. Hun trodde iallfall at han var en fremmed. Basert på bestselgende roman med samme navn av forfatteren av 'Confessions of a shopaholic' Sophie Kinsella.

programme.title: Roustabout
programme.desc: Elvis is a karate-chopping biker who's hired as a carnival Roustabout. At first he just provides muscle and a diversion for the beautiful carny girls. Then he picks up a guitar and gets the midway rockin'.

programme.title: Who Gets The Dog
programme.desc: Når Olive og Clay møttes var det kjærlighet ved første blikk, de giftet seg, kjøpte seg hus og adopterte en nyfødt valp - Wesley. Nå er det 6 år siden, og de har bestemt seg for å skille lag, og begge ønsker å ta sin elskede Wesley med seg.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Forfatteren Ellison (Ethan Hawke) skriver kriminalsaker fra virkeligheten og er på jakt etter en ny bestselger. Uten å fortelle resten av familien om sine motiver, flytter de til et hus der det tidligere har skjedd en rekke bestialske drap.

programme.title: The Uninvited
programme.desc: Basert på Kim Jee-Woons koreanske skrekkfilm fra 2003. Historien handler om to søstre som kommer hjem til faren etter å ha vært på mentalinstitusjon. Deres bedring er hindret av deres onde stemor.

programme.title: The Ring Two
programme.desc: Når det kommer fram en mystisk, umerket videokassett på et lokalt åsted, forstår Rachel at Samara er tilbake og mer bestemt enn noensinne på å fortsette sin ustoppelige terror.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mr. Garrity and the Graves
programme.desc: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Lotto Fever
programme.desc: Johnny is kidnapped by a loser convinced that the psychic ruined his life by helping him win the Lotto.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Shelter
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Saved
programme.desc: In a bizarre turn of events, Stillson (Sean Patrick Flanery) begs Johnny (Anthony Michael Hall) to help him investigate the disappearance of his girlfriend, Miranda (Laura Harris).

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nothing in the Dark
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Once Upon a Time
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Cabin Pressure
programme.desc: On a flight to Washington with Purdy (David Ogden Steirs), Johnny has a vision of their plane crashing and must convince the pilot and onboard Air Marshall to risk the lives of everyone on board.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Kick the Can
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Silence
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: Scary Movie 2
programme.desc: Noen har ført kjærligheten din til oppfølgerne for langt! Favorittkomirollene til Scary Movie er tilbake i en film som skremmer opp enda mer ærbødig moro enn originalen med sitt syn på klisjéhjemsøkte thrillere.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dead Man's Shoes
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Revelations
programme.desc: The arrival of a mysterious young woman from Rev. Purdy's past raises new questions for Johnny about the minister's character.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ring-A-Ding Girl
programme.desc: Bunny receives a ring from her fan club in her home town. In the ring she sees the faces of people from her hometown telling her she's needed there so she returns home.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Quality of Life
programme.desc: Johnny Smith gains trust in his powers after they enable him to save a star high school athlete from a life-threatening heart condition.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Shot an Arrow into the Air
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately, they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.
programme.sub-title: I Shot an Arrow into the Air

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The Combination
programme.desc: Johnny goes public with his vision of a heavyweight contender dying in an upcoming bout but instead of stopping the fight, his announcement turns it into the pay-per-view event of the year.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Odyssey of Flight 33
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
programme.desc: Før Halloween må teamet infiltrere et dypt, enormt hulesystem for å hindre en flaggermusbestand i å ødelegge det nordamerikanske økosystemet.
programme.sub-title: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sly and the Family Stone
programme.desc: På valgdagen, når demokratiet står på spill, blir Team Scorpion kalt inn når noen prøver å skape kaos i det amerikanske presidentvalget.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Mother Load
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion reiser til Irland for Megans ettårsjubileum, oppdager Walter at en naturkatastrofe i en innsjø i nærheten har skapt en giftig sky som kan drepe alle i landsbyen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: This Is the Pits
programme.desc: Paiges mor verver Team Scorpion når hun ved et uhell oppdager en glemt atomreaktor i ferd med å eksplodere.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Walter må svømme gjennom de dødelige La Brea-tjæregropene mens teamet hjelper en kvinne som sitter fast i tjæren før hun går tom for oksygen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Det er julaften og Team Scorpions elektronikkfrie ferie på fjellet blir dødelig når de støter på våpensmuglere og Ralph blir kidnappet mens de prøver å rømme.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Ice Ca-Cabes
programme.desc: Når et oppdrag i ørkenen resulterer i eksploderende splinter som skader Cabe alvorlig, må Team Scorpion fryse kroppen for å redde livet hans.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion blir lurt til å produsere falske penger for en utenlandsk enhet som ønsker å ødelegge den amerikanske økonomien, må Paige stole på moren Veronicas ferdigheter som svindler for å redde dem.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Teamet må redde en mann på kanten av et enormt synkehull som truer med å ødelegge Los Angeles vannforsyning for alltid.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sharknerdo
programme.desc: Team Scorpions jobb med å finne sunkne skatter går galt når Walter og Paiges båt eksploderer, og etterlater dem fortapt midt i Stillehavet omgitt av haier.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Keep It in Check, Mate
programme.desc: Walter og Sylvester deltar undercover i en internasjonal sjakkkturnering på fremmed jord for Team Scorpion for å ta ut en amerikansk spion før identiteten hennes avsløres.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Dirty Seeds, Done Dirt Cheap
programme.desc: Når et enkelt oppdrag for å beskytte en viktig frøbank går galt, må Team Scorpion redde Happy, Sylvester og Cabe, som begynner å lide av livstruende, fryktbaserte hallusinasjoner.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Don't Burst My Bubble
programme.desc: Etter en kraftig storm, sitter Happys venn Ada, som lever i en steril boble for å beskytte sitt kompromitterte immunsystem, igjen med farlig avfall i ferd med å punktere strukturen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Monkey See, Monkey Poo
programme.desc: For å stoppe et farlig virus fra å spre seg, må Team Scorpion finne en sjelden truet ape i Amazonas som har antistoffet for kuren.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Broken Wind
programme.desc: Under et oppdrag for å reparere en turbin ved en vindpark, må Team Scorpion skynde seg for å redde Paige og Happy før kabelen som holder gondolen de er i, går i stykker.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Rock Block
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må trosse ordre fra en utenlandsk regjering når de henter en asteroide fra verdensrommet som inneholder DNA-tråder som kan få dødelige konsekvenser hvis de blir utsatt for luft.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Strife on Mars
programme.desc: Team Scorpion blir sittende fast i en kollapsende og farlig biodom beregnet på Mars mens de prøver å få et par forskere ut.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Satellite of Love
programme.desc: Den nye direktøren for Homeland Security gjenforener teamet når en atomdrevet russisk satellitt blir slått ut av bane og må omdirigeres før den detonerer over Sør-California.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Cuba Libre
programme.desc: Team Scorpion drar til Cuba når en kvinne fra Cabes fortid ber ham om å hjelpe til med å fange en serbisk krigsforbryter.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Fish Filet
programme.desc: For å redde livene til tre dommere går Sylvester undercover i et føderalt fengsel, men Team Scorpion må bryte ham ut når livet hans er i fare.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Robots
programme.desc: Walter, Cabe og Happy er fanget sammen med mannskapet i en topphemmelig ubåt når en eksplosjon sender den til bunnen av havet med begrenset oksygen og en selvdestruksjonsfunksjon som snart vil aktiveres.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 503
programme.desc: Tina og Danni solgte rekkehuset sitt i den tro at de snart skulle finne det rette huset. Men sånn gikk det ikke. Paret er utrolig kresne, og har høye krav. Kan ekspertene skape hjemmet som Tina og Danni drømmer om?

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 504
programme.desc: Laura og Jesper og Jespers to barn leier i Humlebæk, og de er mildt sagt lei av det. De mangler plass, hage - og de vil også ha barn sammen snart. Men to års husjakt har ikke gitt resultat.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO
programme.desc: Kristian drømmer om en diger garasje, og Nathja vil heller bli i Køge – kan Tobias oppfylle drømmene sine?

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO
programme.desc: Maja og Kenneth bor på Vestjylland og drømmer om å komme nærmere familien til Maja i Silkeborg. Men budsjettet deres krever at de går på akkord med beliggenheten og ser i de nærliggende små byene.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 604
programme.desc: Stine og Daniel lengter etter mer plass før de snart utvider familien fra tre til fire. Derfor er det ikke optimalt når Mads ringer og forteller at avtalen med det nye huset deres i Langå ikke gjelder.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 301
programme.desc: Astrid og Steffen skal kjøpe sitt første hus, men de kan ikke gå på kompromiss med ønskene sine. De møter programmets eksperter som skal kjøpe et hus på deres vegne.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Kristianstad
programme.desc: Located in Sweden’s south, beautiful Kristianstad is a 400-year old town surrounded by the ocean, fertile farmland and protected wetlands to aid the environment. Tareq makes his own chocolate and learns all about the art of eel-fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Southwest Jutland
programme.desc: Tareq visits Sydvestjylland – a unique area in Denmark filled with endless contrasts. Many food innovators are using the surrounding environment to take old traditions and apply them to the 21st century.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Nynäshamn
programme.desc: Sunny Nynäshamn is a resort town close to Stockholm, but there is more here than the sea. Tareq meets a prize-winning chocolate maker using ingredients from her garden, visits a thriving local food market, and gets a lesson in how to smoke fish.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Røros
programme.desc: Born as a mining town in the 17th century, Røros is now a center for local and organic food producers. Tareq tries dairy products which Michelin-starred chefs swear by, goes skiing and sledding around Røros many hilly streets

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Vimmerby
programme.desc: Vimmerby is known as the birthplace of beloved author Astrid Lindgren. Tareq finds that the area is also well-regarded for its cuisine. From the children’s theme park to the friendly moose that roam the hills, Vimmerby has a lot to offer visitors.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Trysil
programme.desc: The mountains and snowfall in Trysil mean that the town has to be creative with food; Tareq learns how to make cheese in the traditional way, and goes skiing of course, and takes to the slopes to cook something as skiers pass by.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Värmland
programme.desc: Värmland is home to many of Sweden’s most famous authors and inventors. However, it is also a place with a rich food culture. Tareq gets his hands on a very rare bird to cook and also takes time out to float down a tranquil river on a wooden raft.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Fyn
programme.desc: Tareq visits Fyn, the fairy tale capital of the world. Famous as the birthplace of Hans Christian Andersen, Fyn is also known as the garden of Denmark. Here we explore stunning nature and world class cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Höga Kusten
programme.desc: Created thousands of years ago, the High Coast in the northern part of Sweden is the highest coast in the world. Tareq sets out to sample one of the most extreme types of Swedish food, fermented herring.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: North Denmark
programme.desc: North Jutland has a rich culinary history. The unique conditions have created equally unique products. Tareq meets local food entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever changing environment and putting this region on the culinary map.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Uppsala
programme.desc: Uppsala is the city of knowledge: home to the oldest university in Scandinavia. It’s a wonderful agricultural area surrounded by fertile flatlands. Tareq discovers the historical treasures of Uppsala and its thriving culinary life.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: North Sealand
programme.desc: North Zealand has been a playground of the rich and famous since the fifteenth century. Tareq learns how this beautiful north eastern part of Denmark is the perfect place to go foraging for wild berries and herbs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Åre
programme.desc: Sweden’s largest ski resort Åre is well known for its local ingredients, boasting the highest number of organic food producers per capita in Sweden. The fresh water and clean air create unique conditions for growing excellent food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: The Danish Lakelands
programme.desc: The Danish Lakelands produce some of the finest ingredients that you can find. Tareq has a go at an old cooking technique from New Zealand called Hangi - using heated rocks buried in a pit oven.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: West Sweden
programme.desc: Gothenburg on the west coast of Sweden has recently been discovered as an exciting destination by both international travel journalists and food bloggers. Tareq tracks down an old army barracks which has been converted into a world class cheese factory.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Luleå
programme.desc: Tareq visits Luleå, home to the beautiful Tree Hotel: a collection of treehouses built by an award winning architect. Following the river further up into the mountains he reaches the land where, for centuries, the Sami people kept their reindeer herds.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Halmstad
programme.desc: In Halmstad Tareq explores the contrast between the busy summer scene at the beach and the quiet rural country life, meeting Jörgen Persson: award winning table tennis player and visiting a village famous for its cheese.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Kemi
programme.desc: Kemi is situated in northern Finland by the Bothnian Bay and it is part of Lapland region. Tareq tries his luck at a spot of burbot fishing on the frozen sea and visits the snow castle hotel.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: West Sweden
programme.desc: Situated on the west coast of Sweden, Bohuslän is a place where you can really feel the history of fishing all around a tradition that is still active. Tareq will be harvesting supreme quality oysters and lobsters and cook some wonderful seafood dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Florø
programme.desc: Tareq visits Norway and Florø to celebrate their national day -17th of May. Surrounded by breathtaking archipelagos and stunning fjords he dives for scallops in the north sea, cooking at mountain peaks and exploring the history of norwegian salmon

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Estonia
programme.desc: Tareq makes his way across the baltic sea to Estonia and the capital Tallinn. He discovers the historical treasures of the city and its thriving culinary life before he heads out into the vast and beautiful countryside and the national park of Soomaa.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Ringkøbing
programme.desc: Ringkøbing, a lovely old market town located at the west coast of Denmark. Here, Tareq visit a traditional Herring Festival and meets up with local entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever-changing environment.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Falkenberg
programme.desc: Something is definitely happening in Falkenberg on the west coast of Sweden. Over the last couple of years it have become somewhat of a haven for foodies. Tareq is on a mission; taking him through a fertile landscape with vineyards and salmon fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Öland
programme.desc: Tareq bikes through the unique landscape of Öland, Sweden's second largest island located in the Baltic Sea. It is a place where the interaction between man and nature have created a diverse and rich farmland with an amazing amount of small producers.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Bornholm
programme.desc: Bornholm, the sunny bright green island with it’s own gastronomic tone is a true pioneer when it comes to local food at it’s finest quality. Tareq visit Denmark's first regional food culture house where they develop this unique flourishing cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Laponia
programme.desc: In the northern part of Sweden, you’ll find the stunning world heritage Laponia. Almost 10.000 square kilometres of nature reserves and national parks. Tareq visit the rich, unique culture of the sami in the vast impressive wilderness.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Malmö & Copenhagen
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor returns to his home turf to see what has happened and what the future might bring to the new nordic cuisine. He visits a local goat farmer and meets up with young enthusiastic chefs who takes this nordic legacy further.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Zealand
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor visits the South Coast of Denmark to make his own versions of open-faced sandwiches and smoked fish dishes.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team conducts an undercover sting to locate a cyber crime lord, but the operation is foiled by a charming, brilliant hacker whose desire to take over the online black markets puts him in a dangerous online turf war that could lead to murder.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While tracking down a felon running a heroin ring inside a prison, Agent Ian Edgerton becomes a murder suspect when the informant he meets with ends up dead, sending a desperate Edgerton over the edge when he takes a member of Don's team hostage.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When robbers hit a diamond exchange and take hostages, Don and the team find an unlikely ally in convict John Buckley, who may help the team's investigation when they believe the men are copying Buckley's criminal strategies.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When the team foils a robbery of an armored car full of Federal Reserve money and recover bills that trace back to the infamous D.B. Cooper heist, they call on Agent Roger Bloom, who worked on the Cooper case, for help with the investigation.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team try their luck at investigating the theft of scratch-off lottery tickets, but the stakes are raised when one of the culprits killed at a botched robbery turns out to be a former lottery winner.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team searches for a lost shipment of high-caliber firearms when one of the weapons is responsible for random killings throughout the city. Also, Charlie and Amita disagree on a wedding date while Don re-evaluates his relationship with Robin.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team searches for a serial killer who is targeting men who solicit prostitutes. Also, Colby and Nikki deal with the aftermath of a car crash when they have an accident during the investigation.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team gets a taste of the limelight when they search for jewels worth millions that have been stolen during an awards show broadcast. Also, Don revisits an old case that is haunting him, and Larry returns from his adventure in the desert.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team investigates the deaths of two men who were part of a group of friends that had been sexually assaulted by a teacher when they were young boys.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Charlie and Amita get married and begin preparations for their London adventure, but they put a slight hold on their plans when they assist Don to track down the whereabouts of his gun after it goes missing, on the sixth season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Pilot
programme.desc: I premiereepisoden prøver Don å fakke en serievoldtektsmann som har begynt å drepe ofrene sine. Don rekrutterer Charlie for å hjelpe til med å spore opp morderen.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Sabotasje
programme.desc: Mens de etterforsker en godstogulykke med dødelig utfall, avslører Don og Charlie en sjokkerende gjerningsperson som er ute etter å redusere publikums tillit til jernbanesystemet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Vektor
programme.desc: Da folk i Los Angeles dør på mystisk vis, blir Don og FBI-teamet kalt inn av Folkehelseinstituttet for å finne ut om det er biologisk terror. De prøver å spore opp viruset ved hjelp av Charlies kjennskap til sykdomsmatematikk.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Usikkerhetsprinsipp
programme.desc: Da Don og teamet prøver å fakke et par bankranere i Los Angeles, lager Charlie en ligning ved hjelp av sannsynlighet og statistisk analyse for å finne ut hvor det neste ranet vil finne sted.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Strukturell korrupsjon
programme.desc: Etter at en ingeniørstudent ved CalSci blir funnet død etter et mistenkt selvmord, overtaler Charlie Don til å sette i gang en etterforskning etter å ha lest studentens avhandling, hvor han hevder at det arkitekturisk flotte Cole Center er strukturelt ust

programme.title: Numb3rs: Hovedmistenkt
programme.desc: Da en 5 år gammel jente blir kidnappet fra bursdagsselskapet sitt, leder Don og Terry etterforskningen, men de må be Charlie om hjelp, da jentas far, Ethan, også er matematiker.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Falsk virkelighet
programme.desc: Etter at to tenåringer blir funnet drept, avdekker Don og teamet et farlig nettverk som trykker falske pengesedler.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Identitetskrise
programme.desc: Da det dukker opp ny informasjon i en gammel sak, lurer Don på om han kan ha fått feil person fengslet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Snikskytter null
programme.desc: Don og teamet må stoppe en snikskytter som er på drapstokt i Los Angeles. For å finne snikskytteren raskest mulig, henter Don in en skarpskytterinstruktør fra Quantico (gjesteskuespiller Lou Diamond Phillips) til å hjelpe dem med saken.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Skitten bombe
programme.desc: Don må finne tyvene som stjal en bil med atomavfall før de detonerer en skitten bombe i Los Angeles.

programme.title: Foxfire
programme.desc: Denne filmen handler om fire jenter på videregående som oppdager at de alle tvinges til å ha sex med biologilæreren. Oppdagelsen gjør dem til allierte og venner. Kort tid senere hevner de seg på læreren.

programme.title: Byzantium
programme.desc: To mystiske kvinner lever som vampyrer i skyggene. Når deres fortid innhenter dem, utspiller det seg en episk kamp mellom overlevelse og det fortryllende mysteriet ved evig liv.

programme.title: Nemesis
programme.desc: Året er 2027, og det nye supermennesket som har oppstått er delvis menneske, delvis maskin. Alex er politi i Los Angeles med oppgave å spore terrorister som vil ødelegge den nye informasjonsæraen.

programme.title: Mrs Henderson Presents
programme.desc: En eksentrisk enke åpner et teater med dristige revyforestillinger, som utfordrer moralen i et krigsherjet 1930-talls London.

programme.title: Big Top Pee-Wee
programme.desc: Pee-Wee Herman er en enkel bonde i en liten by. Men plutselig kommer en kraftig storm. Et sirkus ender opp på Pee-Wees gård. Så han lar sirkuset bli der en stund, og det bestemmer seg for å lage et show med en elskverdig figur: Pee-Wee!

programme.title: Wagons East
programme.desc: De var ute etter gull, men nå tar de til takke med innlagt vann. John Candy og Richard Lewis spiller i dette hysterisk ukonvensjonelle blikket på den legendariske ville vesten.

programme.title: Easy Come, Easy Go
programme.desc: On his last day in the Navy, frogman Elvis discovers a sunken treasure ship. On his first day as a civilian, Elvis starts his new job—self-employed treasure hunter!

programme.title: Tucker: The Man And His Dream
programme.desc: En bildesigner utfordrer hele bilindustrien med sine revolusjonerende bildesign.

programme.title: Fantomet
programme.desc: Historien begynner når en ekspedisjon går i land på øya Bengalla på leting etter Tougandas hodeskaller. Med sin evne til å styre energi kan de bli en katastrofe for menneskeheten.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Triangle

programme.desc: Cliff inviterer Diane og Carla til et årlig ball, og uventet sier de begge ja.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Second Time Around

programme.title: Cheers NO: Peterson Principle
programme.desc: Norm får et tips på jobben som kan garantere forfremmelse overfor konkurrentene.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Dark Imaginings
programme.desc: Sam kan ikke godta det faktum at han blir eldre.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Save The Last Dance For Me

programme.title: Cheers NO: Fear Is My Co-Pilot

programme.title: Cheers NO: Relief Bartender

programme.title: Cheers NO: Strange Bedfellows: Part 1
programme.desc: Sam uttrykker interesse for politikk når han faller for en kvinne som stiller til valg i bystyret.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Strange Bedfellows: Part 2

programme.title: Cheers NO: Strange Bedfellows: Part 3

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Cape Cad

programme.title: Cheers NO: Money Dearest
programme.desc: Cliff setter opp et møte mellom moren sin og en ekstremt velstående mann.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Abnormal Psychology
programme.desc: Frasier dukker opp i et TV-show for en debatt med Dr. Lilith Stern.

programme.title: Cheers NO: House of Horrors with Formal Dining and Used Brick
programme.desc: Cliff overnatter når Carla blir skremt i sitt nye hus.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Young Dr. Weinstein
programme.desc: Sam stjeler Dianes middagsreservasjon på en fancy restaurant.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Knights of the Scimitar

programme.title: Cheers NO: Thanksgiving Orphans

programme.title: Cheers NO: Everyone Imitates Art
programme.desc: Et magasin avviser Dianes dikt og godtar Sams forfatterskap i stedet.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Book of Samuel
programme.desc: Woody lyver for kjæresten fra hjembyen når hun dukker opp med en annen fyr.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Dance, Diane, Dance
programme.desc: Diane blir lurt til å tro at hun kan bli en stor dansestjerne.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Chambers vs. Malone

programme.title: Cheers NO: Diamond Sam

programme.title: Cheers NO: Never Love a Goalie, Part 2

programme.desc: Diane og Sam blir enige om en 24-timers separasjon for å oppfylle andre ønsker.

programme.desc: Cliff saksøker, og ender opp med å bli forblindet av den vakre tiltalte.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Godfather III

programme.title: COPS: You Didn't Get Very Far
programme.desc: A man complains of heart trouble after running from police, a suspect in a stolen car leads officers on a wild chase, and police check on a disabled vehicle and its occupants.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Not My Text Messages
programme.desc: A man refusing to comply gets tased, recent texts on a suspect's phone paint a different story from what he's told officers, and a woman tries to hide evidence from police.

programme.title: COPS: Hands Off the Junk
programme.desc: The driver of a stolen car leads police on a winding chase, undercover officers run a prostitution sting, and a woman's domestic disturbance call leads to her own arrest.

programme.title: COPS: Dealt a Bad Hand
programme.desc: Suspects flee an overturned auto, a man is accused of battery with a chain leash, and an unlucky gambler is dealt another losing hand by police when he decides to drive drunk.

programme.title: COPS: Batter Up
programme.desc: A couple assaults a tow lot employee who won't release their car, a suspicious man catches a patrol's attention, and police detain a carload of suspected shoplifters.

programme.title: COPS: Mohawked Cleaning Service
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest draws a crowd, a homeless man decides to camp out in someone's house while they're in the hospital and a traffic stop results in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS: The Runaways
programme.desc: A driver pursued by police bails from her moving vehicle, a jaywalker decides to run from officers, and a patrol encounters a little boy who decided to run away from home.

programme.title: COPS: Perfume Takedown
programme.desc: A man caught shoplifting gets an earful from his fed-up mom, police use surveillance video to track down an armed robber, and deputies oversee a contentious custody exchange.

programme.title: COPS: Put Your Clothes Back On
programme.desc: A disoriented suspect would rather take a shower than comply with officers, a stolen vehicle sting nets a surprisingly young driver, and a traffic stop leads to a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS: Tazed and Confused
programme.desc: A neighborhood patrol investigates a car with no plates, a man walking in the street takes off when approached by officers, and a man breaks down as police search his vehicle.

programme.title: COPS: Cruisin' the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: COPS: Step Away from the Cutlery
programme.desc: Police track a possible stolen vehicle, a man upset with his neighbors takes matters into his own hands, and officers try to placate a man holding a knife to his own throat.

programme.title: COPS: Love Bites
programme.desc: A person in a wheelchair gets the better of a possible assailant, a domestic argument escalates to biting, and a man who cuts off a patrolman goes on the offensive.

programme.title: COPS: Running in Traffic
programme.desc: A man wrecks his friend's car while fleeing police, detectives arrest a man wanted for armed robbery and attempted murder, and officers spy a subject who eluded them earlier.

programme.title: COPS: Taser Proof
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: COPS: You'll Shoot Your Eye Out
programme.desc: A mom takes sides when a battle breaks out between brothers, and a man is accused of targeting children with a BB gun.

programme.title: COPS: I'll Raise My Voice Right Back!
programme.desc: A narcotics sting in Alabama yields arrests, officers chase a drunk driver to his front yard, and a woman who called the police for help does not make a good case for herself.
programme.sub-title: I'll Raise My Voice Right Back!

programme.title: COPS: We Know Who You Are
programme.desc: Officers respond to a mental health crisis, a man runs from police when approached, and officers recognize a burglary suspect as someone they've tangled with before.

programme.title: COPS: Lady Bit My Finger
programme.desc: Missouri police recover a stolen vehicle, a scuffle between two women at a bar escalates to biting, and a concerned neighbor places a possible domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS: Familiar Faces
programme.desc: A young carjacking suspect in custody gets a tongue-lashing from his mom and aunt, a man terrorizing his mom gets tased, and police give chase to a familiar vehicle.

programme.title: COPS: Facebook Fury
programme.desc: A DUI suspect is incensed about being detained, a woman calls police regarding a naked man on her porch, and an eight-year-old girl deprived of social media throws a tantrum.

programme.title: COPS: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: Police track a vehicle leaving a known drug house, officers sort out the facts of a domestic disturbance call, and a daughter trashes her parents' house and threatens police.

programme.title: COPS: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS: The One Dollar Shoe
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS: Getting Funcky
programme.desc: A cyclist takes flight, police find a woman at the wheel of a stolen truck, and officers roll up on a couple smoking meth while their four-year-old is in the car with them.

programme.title: COPS: Hit and Run
programme.desc: The threat of a tasing is enough to slow a fleeing suspect, a heated argument between girlfriends leads to vehicular assault, and a man with weed in his car has no poker face.

programme.title: COPS: Be Careful What You Ask For
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.
programme.sub-title: Be Careful What You Ask For

programme.title: COPS: Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS: Sittin' in the Dark
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: COPS: The Blame Game
programme.desc: An arrested man has a long list of instructions for his "bae," and a driver charged with heroin possession claims he was framed by the passenger in his backseat.

programme.title: COPS: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: COPS: That's My Grill
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS: Drive and Dash
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: COPS: Thick as Thieves
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: COPS: Pinky Promise
programme.desc: An officer finds a woman asleep at the wheel in the middle of a highway, deputies investigate a possible kidnapping, and a nervous driver just wants to be honest with police.

programme.title: COPS: Dead End Dash
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: COPS: Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.
programme.sub-title: Four Felonies and a Flat Tire

programme.title: COPS: Pants Party
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: COPS: Smooth Move
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: Star Trek I: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: Når et uidentifisert romvesen ødelegger tre kraftfulle Klingon-kryssere, vender kaptein James T. Kirk (William Shatner) tilbake til det nylig ombyggede U.S.S. Enterprise(tm) for å ta kommandoen.

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: Det er 2200-tallet. Føderasjonens U.S.S. Enterprise er på et treningsoppdrag og det virker som om admiral James T. Kirk (William Shatner) er resignert på at inspeksjonen kan bli den siste romferden i sin karriere. Men Khan er tilbake.

programme.title: Star Trek 3 - Jakten På Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirks seier over Khan og dannelsen av Genesis-planeten er tomme seiere. Spock er død og McCoy drives uforklarlig mot galskap. Så gir et overraskelsesbesøk fra Sarek, Spocks far, en forbløffende avsløring.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Mannskapet på Federation-skipet Enterprise tilkalles til Nimbus III, Planeten for intergalaktisk fred. De skal forhandle over en bortføring, men får vite at kidnapperen er en slektning av Spock.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: Etter årevis med krig, nærmer Federation og Klingon-imperiet seg en fredssamling når et Klingon-skip nesten blir ødelagt i et tilsynelatende angrep fra Enterprise. Begge verdener forbereder seg på det som kan bli deres dødeligste møte så langt.

programme.title: Star Trek VII: Generations
programme.desc: Picards eneste håp for fremtiden er Nexus... og en legendarisk kaptein fra fortiden.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: Etter en episk kamp mot borgene (cybernetisk forsterkede livsformer), følger kaptein Picard og hans besetning borgene tilbake til 2000-tallet for å hindre at de endrer jordens tidslinje og den første utenomjordiske kontakten.

programme.title: Star Trek IX: Insurrection
programme.desc: Når mannskapet på Enterprise får vite om føderasjonens plott mot innbyggerne av en unik planet, starter kaptein Picard et åpent opprør.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Audrey Jouannet Case
programme.desc: September 16 2005. The lifeless body of Audrey Jouannet, 24, is found hidden under the bed in her small apartment in Soisy-sur-Seine. It soon becomes apparent that the young woman has been tortured at length before being strangled.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Valerie Bary Case)
programme.desc: On Friday, March 26, 2004, in the region of Dijon, Laurent Bary came home from his work to discover the lifeless body of his wife, Valerie, bathing in a pool of blood.
programme.sub-title: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Valerie Bary Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Triple Murders in Vise
programme.desc: On May 17th 2005, a body is discovered in a forest of Sucy-en-Brie; Christophe Belle, 40 years old, a renowned pastry cook.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Mathilde Croguenne Case
programme.desc: In the early hours of the morning, Mathilde Croguennec, 18, attending \"Teknival\" in Brittany, is found at the foot of a tree with her throat cut. Investigators face the task of finding the killer among the 43,000 participants of this festival

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: In Search of SK1 - Akira Ojima Case
programme.desc: On October 13th 1996, the body of young Angélique Dumetz, 18 years old, is recovered down a ditch in Oise forest. An important clue is found on the crime scene.
programme.sub-title: In Search of SK1 - Akira Ojima Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Evelyne Boucher Case
programme.desc: On December 9th 1987, the naked body of the young Evelyne Boucher is found near Avignon. An unprecedented investigation begins making headlines.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Sylvie Darcy Case
programme.desc: On February 26th 2012, in the Yevelines. Around 11PM policemen are called for an assault in a parking lot in the forest of Saint-Lambet-des-Bois.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Hanging On Houseboat (Aubry case)
programme.desc: Dominique Aubry, a rich widow of 58, is found hanged on her barge in Neuilly. It appears that since the death of her husband on a trip to Mauritius, Dominique Aubry has been ailing.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Hanging On Houseboat (Aubry case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Only DNA Can Say - Angélique Dumetz
programme.desc: On February 23th 2017, policemen are alerted of the disapearrance of Brigitte Troadec, her husband Pascal, and their children Sébastien and Charlotte.
programme.sub-title: Only DNA Can Say - Angélique Dumetz

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Jean-Raymond Blatti Case
programme.desc: Arriving at her work, the secretary of a small firm in the suburbs of Geneva finds the body of Jean-Raymond Blatti, the company's new accountant. The man is lying in a pool of blood and, on his belly, the murderer has written \"DIRTY RAPIST\".

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)
programme.desc: Police in Strasbourg receive a startling emergency call from Doctor Jean-Louis Muller, a forensic pathologist well known in the region.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Christophe Lejard Case
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Christophe Lejard is found by his son just metres from their home. The man was shot in the head as he was getting into his car to go to work. An execution, which at first glance doesn't square with the profile of a quiet family man.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Deathly Fatal Passion At the Hotel (Villermet case)
programme.desc: The body of Nathalie Villermet, 46, manager of a small hotel and -restaurant, is found by a walker in the woods outside Paris, hidden under branches.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deathly Fatal Passion At the Hotel (Villermet case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Little Martyrship of A10: The Inass Touloub Affair
programme.desc: On August 11, 1987, the Orléans police discover the bruised corpse of a 4-year-old child behind a guardrail on the A10 motorway.
programme.sub-title: The Little Martyrship of A10: The Inass Touloub Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Céline Marchand Case
programme.desc: On May 30th 2015 in Sorinières, Yann Machand reports his wife Céline Marchand missing.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Victims of a Sadist - Cyril Koskinas Case
programme.desc: On July 19th 2004, the naked and tied up body of a woman is recovered in the Ourcq canal in Fresnes-sur-Marne. The victim is impossible to identify.
programme.sub-title: Victims of a Sadist - Cyril Koskinas Case

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 407
programme.desc: Vi møter Maria, som etter en brystoperasjon fikk store abscesser og hull helt inn til implantatet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 203
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Pia, som fikk stafylokokker etter en brystforstørrende operasjon og måtte gå i seks måneder med bare ett implantat.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 701
programme.desc: Etter en alvorlig ulykke, hvor Dan faller ned fra et tak og lander på ansiktet, opereres han to ganger for å rette opp nesen sin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 510
programme.desc: Etter fødselen velger Camilla å operere brystene. Det viser seg imidlertid at kirurgen ved en feil har brukt tråder som ikke er selvoppløsende, og Camilla lever i dag med store sår.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 610
programme.desc: Sportsgale Jeanette ble inspirert for 12 år siden av en trend i treningsstudioet, hvor vennene hennes fikk forstørret brystene. I motsetning til venninnene liker hun ikke de nye, store puppene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: I 2010 fikk Birthe satt inn saltvannsimplantater i stedet for de vanlige silikonimplantatene. 5 år senere våkner hun til et skremmende syn - det ene implantatet hennes er borte.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 605
programme.desc: Når Annika ble 30 år, fikk hun penger til en skjønnhetsoperasjon av mannen sin. Paret reiser sammen til Litauen, men allerede på operasjonsdagen oppdager Annika at den litauiske kirurgen ikke gjorde det de hadde avtalt.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 702
programme.desc: Jeanett bryster henger etter at hun har født to barn, og hun bestemmer seg for å ta et brystløft og implantater. Men operasjonen blir en skuffelse for Jeanett.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 801
programme.desc: For 25 år siden var Susanne involvert i en voldsom trafikkulykke som vansiret ansiktet hennes. Siden ulykken har hun vært gjennom mer enn ti operasjoner, men føler likevel at hun ser ut som et monster.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 611
programme.desc: Etter å ha ammet over en lenger periode får Pernille slappe bryster, og hun velger derfor å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon. Men i dag er hun så lei seg over resultatet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 804
programme.desc: Allerede i en alder av 15 år bestemmer Caroline seg for at hun vil bruke sparepengene sine på nye bryster så snart hun fyller 18. Men høyre bryst begynte å henge, og brystene hennes ble ulike.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 206
programme.desc: Louise brukte familiens penger på en brystoperasjon som ble en traumatisk opplevelse for henne. Camilla er flau over brystvortene sine, og Jeanette lever i frykt for at implantatene er giftige.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 508
programme.desc: Etter to svangerskap er Jeannette lei av strekkmerkene på magen. Lokalpolitiker Karina satt igjen med to bryster uten fylde, etter å ha ammet sine to barn.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 612
programme.desc: Etter et stort vekttap har 25 år gamle Michele fått en gastric bypass-operasjon, men resultatet er skuffende og Michele har hatt store problemer med livskvaliteten.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 602
programme.desc: Carina har fått fjernet hudkreft på nesen og fikk i 2012 gjort en rekonstruksjon med egen hud. I dag er hun så lei seg over nesen sin at hun ikke vil være med på familiebilder.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 704
programme.desc: Iben drømmer om å vinne kroppsfitness for nybegynnere, men hun føler at hennes bryster er i veien. Men uansett hvor mye hun jobber med kroppen sin, kan hun ikke trene brystene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 512
programme.desc: Nina jobber som danser, men føler seg veldig utilpass i jobben fordi det ene brystimplantatet hennes flytter på seg og kløften hennes er mindre pen.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 806
programme.desc: Tinas mareritt startet i 2015, når hun får en svulst på nesen som fortsetter å vokse. Hun må gjennomgå strålebehandling for å få den fjernet, men svulsten etterlater et gap som må lukkes.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Vi møter Maja, som skammer seg så mye over silikonbrystene sine, at hun holder resultatet hemmelig for mannen sin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 204
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Melissa, som gikk i tilbudsfellen, og Dorte, som syns at magen hennes ser ut som en rumpe.
