programme.title: South Park: Agentbyrået
programme.desc: Som talentmanagere kan Cartman, Stan og Kenny innkassere 10 % av klientenes inntekter, men et annet byrå stjeler deres eneste klient.

programme.title: South Park: En million små fibre
programme.desc: Towelie skriver en bok som blir valgt ut til Oprahs bokklubb og blir en bestselger blant folk som vil overvinne avhengighet.

programme.title: South Park: Mysteriet med toeren på pissoaret
programme.desc: Cartman tror han vet hvem som står bak angrepene 11. september.

programme.title: South Park: Momben
programme.desc: Innbyggerne i South Park forbereder seg til et besøk av Hillary Clinton. Cartman mistenker at en muslimsk elev er involvert i et mulig terroristangrep.

programme.title: South Park: Mer drittproblemer
programme.desc: Randy slår verdensrekorden 'største bæsj', og den tidligere rekordinnehaveren Bono vil ha tilbake tronen. Men han har en mørk hemmelighet som kanskje kan hindre ham.

programme.title: South Park: Britneys nye stil
programme.desc: Mediesirkuset kommer til South Park når Britney gjemmer seg i den avsidesliggende fjellbyen. Guttene prøver å hjelpe den plagede popstjernen.

programme.title: South Park: Kina-problemet
programme.desc: Cartman blir forskrekket over den storslåtte OL-seremonien og ber Butters om hjelp til å konfrontere kineserne. Samtidig blir Stan og Kyle vitne til 'voldtekten' av Indiana Jones.

programme.title: South Park: Ringen
programme.desc: Kenny tar med den nye kjæresten sin til en Jonas Brothers-konsert der de får kyskhetsringer.

programme.title: South Park: Fiskepikker
programme.desc: Jimmi er rasende for at Cartmann prøver å ta æren for en vits som han fant på og som nå er blitt populær i hele landet. Men en sint Kanye West klarer ikke å forstå poenget.

programme.title: South Park: Døde kjendiser
programme.desc: Michael Jacksons spøkelse nekter å akseptere å måtte vandre heden og etterlater resten av de nylig avdøde berømtheter frustrert i Skjærsilden.

programme.title: South Park: Sexhjelpen
programme.desc: Kyle og Butters befinner seg midt blant Amerikas superkjendiser når de gjennomgår en behandling for sexavhengighet. Cartman og Stan er limt til Tiger Woods-kampen.

programme.title: South Park: Lattermaskinen
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt gjort narr av på The South Park Elementary Comedy Awards, bygger Germany en uovervinnerlig lattermaskin: Funnybot. Men dens planer for menneskeheten går likevel ikke altfor bra.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman finner kjærligheten
programme.desc: Cartman spiller matchmaker når en ny jente flytter til South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Kravene heves
programme.desc: Cartman innrømmer endelig at han er feit og får umiddelbart en permobil.

programme.title: South Park: Hobbiten
programme.desc: Wendy prøver å pare en av sine venninner med Butters, men hun ender opp på kontoret til skolekuratoren.

programme.title: South Park: #Oppkok
programme.desc: Kyle vil bare spille tv-spill med lillebroren sin. Men da Ike vil ikke spille med ham mer, blir Kyle redd for at neste generasjon vil forbigå ham.

programme.title: South Park: Glade hologram
programme.desc: Cartman trender, mens resten av USA forbereder seg til det største juleprogrammet på tv noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Fabuløs og modig
programme.desc: Gutta viser Caitlyn Jenner sin enormt store respekt i det mest fabuløse og modige 'South Park'-avsnittet noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Trygt sted
programme.desc: Cartman er siste offer innen kroppsskam.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Cartmans mor er en hore
programme.desc: Dr. Mephisto hjelper Cartman med å avsløre farens identitet, og alle mannlige innbyggere i South Park er aktuelle kandidater.

programme.title: South Park: Byen ved avgrunnens rand (tilbakeblikk)
programme.desc: Skolebussen krasjer i en snøstorm og blir stående på kanten av et stup.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef prøver å kreve royalties da et plateselskap slipper en låt han hevder han skrev for over 20 år siden.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Tamponger av cherokeehår
programme.desc: Kyle trenger nyretransplantasjon og Cartman er den perfekte donor, men setter en høy pris for nyren: 10 millioner dollar.

programme.title: South Park: Her kommer nabolaget
programme.desc: Token føler seg ensom fordi han er eneste rike barn i byen, og lokker andre velstående mennesker til South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Den nye Terrance og Phillip-filmtraileren
programme.desc: Alle barna i South Park er superspente på å se den første traileren for den nye Terrance og Phillip-filmen.

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Jimmy og Timmy blir medlemmer av gjengen The Crips, som de tror er en klubb for funksjonshemmede.

programme.title: South Park: Feitrumpe og pannekakehode
programme.desc: Cartman lager en J-Lo-fingerdukke til et arrangement som skal hylle latinamerikanere.

programme.title: South Park: Dum, bortskjemt hore-leketøy
programme.desc: Paris Hilton åpner butikk i South Park og forderver jentenes moral - bare Wendy holder fast på sine prinsipper.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan og Kyle står overfor sitt store gjennombrudd med Guitar Hero-ferdighetene sine. Manageren deres overbeviser Stan om at Kyle holder ham tilbake, og skaper spenninger mellom dem.

programme.desc: Musikalfeberen når South Park, og guttene må spille med eller miste popularitet.

programme.title: South Park: Tiss
programme.desc: Høyt urininnhold i svømmebassenget fører til en katastrofe som ødelegger guttas dag, særlig Kyles. Og Cartmans xenofobi får fritt utløp igjen.

programme.title: South Park: Broadway-brødrene
programme.desc: Når Randy forstår hemmeligheten bak musikaler, kan han ikke slutte med å ta med seg Sharon for å se dem. Andrew Lloyd-Webber og Elton John advarer ham mot å avsløre deres hemmelighet.

programme.title: South Park: Butter slår tilbake
programme.desc: Butters blir i hemmelighet plaget av sin bestemor og Stan ønsker å øke bevisstheten om farene ved mobbing. Stans idé er å spille inn en stor dansevideo, men suksessen raskt går til hodet på ham.

programme.title: South Park: Glutenfri ebola
programme.desc: South Park blir glutenfritt.

programme.title: South Park: Pre-CIS
programme.desc: Ifølge Eric Cartman har Wendy Testaburger blitt lesbisk.

programme.title: South Park: Du yelper ikke til
programme.desc: Cartman ser seg som den beste restaurantkritikeren på nettet i South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Legg den fra deg
programme.desc: Nord-Korea sikter mot South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Hummel-figurer og heroin
programme.desc: Feirede underholdere faller fra i sine beste år på grunn av massive overdoser av opiater. Stan er i ferd med å bli avslørt som kilden til de illegale stoffene.

programme.title: South Park: Dobbeltrøbbel i Kina
programme.desc: Randy ser en mulighet for Tegridy i China.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Chefs salte sjokoladeboller
programme.desc: Chef får ikke solgt karamellene sine på en filmfestival, så han går over til salte sjokoladeballer og lager en reklamesang.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef prøver å kreve royalties da et plateselskap slipper en låt han hevder han skrev for over 20 år siden.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Verdens største blokkfløytekonsert
programme.desc: Klassen skal spille på en blokkfløytekonsert i Mr Garrisons hjemby i Arkansas, og forsøker å finne den mystiske 'brune lyden'.

programme.title: South Park: Timmy 2000
programme.desc: Guttene hermer etter Timmy, som har ADHD, for å slippe å gjøre lekser.

programme.title: South Park: Noe du kan gjøre med fingeren din
programme.desc: Guttene danner boybandet 'Fingerbang' og får spillejobb på kjøpesenteret.

programme.desc: Guttene setter opp sin egen versjon av Helen Kellers historie for å overgå barnehagens forestilling.

programme.desc: Guttene bryter seg inn for å stjele urnen med Kennys aske.

programme.title: South Park: Moro med kampsportvåpen
programme.desc: Guttene kjøper våpen på et loppemarked og blir forvandlet til japanske anime-krigere, med alvorlige konsekvenser for stakkars Butters.

programme.title: South Park: Dø, hippie, dø
programme.desc: Cartman blir arrestert for å fange hippier, men når South Park blir oversvømmet av hippier, vender de seg til ham og hans uvanlige metoder for hippiefjerning.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve assigns Amy Devlin and Taylor Lucas, two police officers from the Vice Squad, to assist in solving the homicide of local pimp Milton Wilder. However, Taylor convinces her partner to take a temporary detour on their way to the investigation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The new attending physician, Kate Delibe, is causing a stir at Community General with her unorthodox methods of care. Delibe assists terminally ill patient George Dugan's suicide against Dr. Sloan's wishes.
programme.sub-title: Today Is The Last Day Of The Rest Of My Life

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As Lou Summers heads to the comedy club to host Mark's Man of the Year Roast, a driver in a nearby car shoots at him and misses, but Lou doesn't hear it because his hearing aids aren't on.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan is caught between family and professional loyalties as his brother Stacy, and medical student Daniel, are both implicated in a mysterious series of events that end in an accidental death.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve responds to a call where earlier a man chased another man out of a store with a gun.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Dr. Wesley, Dean of the medical school, is arrested for sale of narcotics, she pleads her innocence to Mark. Meanwhile, Mark's student Quinn and neighbor Jennifer plan to marry.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While out on his morning jog, Jesse unsuccessfully attempts to save a man who has locked himself in his gargage with the engine running, an apparent suicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: After Madison hears that Lisa, a personal friend and one of her star students, has missed a few classes, she visits her and finds Lisa comatose from a drug overdose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a case of mistaken identity when Greg, a mobster who looks just like Mark, is released from prison and moves into Mark's neighborhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse operates and removed the bullet from Greg, thinking he is Mark. But everything starts to unfold when mark show up for his shift at the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark's patient and shock-jock radio talk show host Denise announces her nation-wide search for her birth mother and jokes that she'll kill her if she doesn't want anything to do with her.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Soft music, candles, and a lifeless body dressed in lovely lingerie. These are the trademarks of 'The Casanova Killer,' a serial murderer who leaves only a stain of blood near the heart, and the sole of a foot marred by an 'X,' as forensic evidence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and Steve investigate a private eye's murder in the not-very-pretty world of modeling.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A cardiologist and two business partners plot a deadly insurance scam.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A terrorist bombing ignites an undercover investigation involving an ambitious cop.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan finds a murder victim among the trauma patients from a major bus accident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A senator's drug-addicted daughter is killed during an altercation with her father, but a senior aide covers up the incident as an overdose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and a headstrong attorney (Piper Laurie) investigate a drive-by shooting at a high school.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's daughter (Stacy Van Dyke) escapes from her abusive husband---a trucker who turns up murdered.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Annie re-introduces Caroline to the wonderful world of dating, by taking her on a man-hunt, but when Caroline thinks she has met the perfect man, she later finds that he's no love connection.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Del surprises Caroline (Lea Thompson) with a marriage proposal, Richard (Malcolm Gets) feels he no longer fits into Caroline's life and decides it's time to look for another job.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Del (Eric Lutes) takes Caroline (Lea Thompson) on a spontaneous weekend trip, they unexpectedly run into Del’s bitter ex-wife Jill (guest star Joely Fisher) and her boyfriend Blair (guest star Kenny Johnson).

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Annie discover that a John Landis movie is shooting in their neighborhood, they jump at the chance to become extras, but Annie’s excitement turns to sheer bliss when she learns that her dream man is starring in the film.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) helps Richard (Malcolm Gets) confront unresolved issues with his jet-setting mother, Natalie (Elizabeth Ashley, “Evening Shade”), when she makes a surprise visit to New York.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) entrusts Annie(Amy Pietz) with various maid-of-honor duties, she learns that Annie’s strong suits aren’t dependability and punctuality and their frien2dship strains under the stress of preparing for Caroline’s wedding.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is confused by nervous pangs and Del experiences panic attacks. Meanwhile, Richard decides to confess his love to Caroline as a last-ditch effort to stop her from marrying Del.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline decides that if she and Del resume dating they should abstain from lovemaking for a fortnight and instead focus on what’s at the core of their relationship.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is thrilled when romantic sparks fly between her and the emergency room veterinarian who treats Salty for a minor injury.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline finally discovers that Richard is back in New York, she offers him his old position back and Richard must decide if he wants to be in Caroline's life again.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie finds herself being audited by IRS agent Jimmy Callahan she misconstrues his friendly manner for amorous interest.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline's young boyfriend Joe declares his undying love for her, she realizes that she is not ready for the level of commitment that Joe arrived at so quickly.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Guy Who Gets There Too Soon

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard's dream of being a paid artist comes true when he is commissioned to paint a mural for New York City.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When gentile Del falls for Risa Glickman, who only dates Jewish men, he takes drastic measures to pretend that he is Jewish.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Nice Jewish Boy

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline discovers that Richard's father is a former vaudeville comic, Ben Karinsky and tries to reunite him with a reluctant Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline observes that her pet cat Salty is troubled, she consults her veterinarian boyfriend, Joe, who suggests taking Salty to an eccentric cat therapist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie's mother shows up on Annie's doorstep with suitcase in hand, Caroline finds herself caught in the middle.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Another side of Caroline's artistic expression -- her dream of being a ballerina -- is revealed when she is locked in a laundromat overnight with a homeless man.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Joe's romance takes a nosedive when his ex-girlfriend Lisa returns from her Greenpeace mission and seeks shelter at Joe's apartment.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie's sister Donna visits New York in hopes of resurrecting her career, she finds the love letter Richard hid from Caroline and decides that setting the lyrics to music could be her next big hit, forcing Richard to feel slightly off-key.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Del brings one of Richard's paintings to a posh country club to impress a girl, but the best impresssion is made on a wealthy socialite, much to Richard's delight.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline cheers Richard on when he gets the chance to win big money by making the half-court free-throw shot at a New York Knicks game.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard finds himself in a life-or-death predicament when Caroline aims to boost the value of his work by convincing an influential art columnist that Richard is a deceased artist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feels that Annie consistently chooses the men in her life over their friendship and challenges Annie to take a girls-only trip, but chaos ensues when they take a trip together and both girls find romance at a local ski resort.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline, who is trying to face single life bravely, tries her hand at an evening on the town alone, with a little coaching from Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline supports Del in his efforts to expand business for her "Caroline in the City" cartoon strip and merchandise.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline's naive, helpful nature comes out in full bloom when she starts catering to her new elderly neighbor, Miriam, but Annie thinks Caroline is being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that only one newspaper in the country has not renewed her cartoon strip, she obsesses on the matter until finally convincing herself to face the editors in person.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline has difficulty confronting her neglectful building superintendent, Mr. Tedescu about her faulty plumbing, so she hires a mediator to pressure Mr. Tedescu into taking care of her request.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard is stunned when his former love Julia informs him that she is about to be married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: In the ongoing charade of Caroline pretending that she and Richard are married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: A remorseful Caroline panics when she realizes that several hours have passed since she poured her heart out to Richard on his answering machine -- and she hasn't heard a response from him.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline realizes that the constant aching in her neck could be related to the stress she feels over her unresolved feelings toward Richard, but she doesn't let it get in the way of helping Richard navigate through troubled waters with Julia.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feigns having read a writer’s novel to impress him, but their first date is a disaster as Caroline’s charade crumbles. Meanwhile, Richard jumps to Julia’s rescue when her waitress job at Remo’s leaves her customers hungry for attention.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that she’s been receiving free cable, her honesty with the cable company gets her into deep trouble with her not-so-truthful neighbors.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie is visited by her old singing teacher, Miss McGowan, Caroline helps Annie pretend to still have her “Cats” role, an act that may have a surprise ending.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine fears the worst when the cabbies invite themselves to her party for her highbrow art world friends who have no clue that she moonlights as a cab driver.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex feels sympathy for a fare who’s a real loser with the women and arranges a date for the man with Elaine, who later discovers that her klutzy companion for the evening is a U.S. Congressman.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas’ youthful and attractive mother makes her first visit to America, and after she and Alex meet and have an evening love affair, Latka assumes that he will soon be getting a new daddy.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Alex’s ear is nearly shot off in a holdup attempt in his cab, he stuns his fellow cabbies by quitting and exchanging his driving clothes for a waiter’s tuxedo at a snobbish French restaurant.
programme.sub-title: Alex Tastes Death & Finds A Nice Restaurant

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies fall victim to a Hollywood-style roller coaster ride when a production company visits to do a film on taxi drivers. Life at the Sunshine Cab Company turns into a continual champagne and buffet festivity.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When John crashes Cab 804, the cabbies are shocked into a period of mourning, as they reminisce about the wild and memorable events that occurred when they were driving the legendary cab.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas frantically works to save the cracked-up Cab 804 as the cabbies fondly recall times in the legendary auto when Alex delivered a baby, Louie beat a rich brat out of a wad of money, and Elaine met the perfect man.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a dream come true for Tony when he’s challenged by an aging ex-champ, but he has more than just a fight on his hand when the opposition unveils its secret weapon.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies are in for a comedy surprise when the small town kid Bobby befriends, Steve, lands a big role as Romeo the first day he arrives in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tells Elaine that her hectic schedule of being a mother, a cabbie and a museum employee is driving her crazy and that she should see a psychiatrist. Elaine decides that a quicker cure would be to spend the night with Alex.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby and Tony’s friendship is on the line when they become embroiled in a hilarious love triangle and attempt to outdo each other in vying for the affection of a beautiful young lady.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The overweight blind date Alex once had returned to the scene a svelte shell of her former self, and eager for the romance she yearns for with Alex
programme.sub-title: The Lighter Side Of Angela Matusa

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The riotous race of the century pits Alex against Louie in a winner-take-all bet to see who can bring in the most receipts. Lecherous Louie uses every dirty trick in the book to make sure he wins his prize—an evening with Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies try to make Tony a family man when they convince him to adopt the adorably precocious eight-year-old boy named Brian whom he befriended.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Ronnie og Sam
programme.desc: Spenningen stiger mellom Angelina og Sammi. Ronnies lenge imøtesette ankomst slår følelsgnister fra samboerne da de treffes i Nashville.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jerseys varm kylling-utfordring
programme.desc: Gjenforeningen mellom Ronnie og Sammi blir kjempeklein. Paulys vil bryte spenningen og får samboerne til å spise varm kylling. Vinny spiser varm mat.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Er du venner med henne?
programme.desc: Deena er i bakgrunnen med turplanleggingen da gjengen planlegger familieferie til Tucson. Etterpå deltar Sammi i en a viral TikTok.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jersey Shore fanklubb
programme.desc: Tucson-oppholdet blir verre da en Jersey Shore-fanklubb lekker Angelinas DM. Tingene tilspisser seg mellom Angelina og Sammi.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Ronnie, Sammi og Justin
programme.desc: Mike tar en nødsamtale til Thomaste da feiden mellom Sammi og Angelina begynner å koke. Ronnie drar til Tucson for nok en familieferie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: OG-kvelden
programme.desc: Gjengen tar oss tilbake til 2009. Pauly planlegger et puss. Mike vil skrive en beskjed.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Gratulerer med dagen, Snooki!
programme.desc: Turen er i ferd med å avsluttes da RSVP rider innn i det gamle Tucson for å legge an på noen cowboyer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Strandkompisene er tilbake for å avholde Sammi og Rons lenge etterlengtede gjenforening. Mike tar nok en bit av Nashvilles hete kylling, og vi finner ut om våpenhvilen mellom Angelina og Sammi stadig gjelder i første del av gjenforeningsspesialen..

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Strandkompisene flesker til. Nicoles tidlige utgivelse og Nashville hot chicken krever nok et offer. Samt et legandarisk Jersey Shore-øyeblikk får en spagettiwestern-vri. Finn ut i andre del av Jersey Shores familiegjenforening!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Sammi tar et stort skritt. Vinny åpner seg om psykiske problemer. Nicole leter etter svar. Angelina og Mike fører ekstra feider til kjøttbollefesten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Hvem vinner første pris i den årlige kjøttbollekonkurransen? Gjengen er invitert til Las Vegas for 'det store spillet', og å være i Paulys 'nye' hus.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jwoww tok helt av, og kjøttbollene forberedte seg for åpnebaringen den første utekvelden i Las Vegas. Samtidig renset Angelina og 2.0 luften i Jersey.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Guido fikser verken bunkeren eller sannheten om at det store spillet faktisk ikke kan være det.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Snooki gjør store fremskritt i å finne sine biologiske foreldre. Paulys 'store spill' er endelig her.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Det spraker fortsatt mellom Angelina og Nicole.når Las Vegas-turnèen nesten er over, Klarer gjengen seg uskadd ut av Vegas?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jenni åpner seg som aldri før. Mike og Lauren er på nære nippet. Mens krangelen mellom Angelina og Nicole vokser, er tiden inne for en fredsfest.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: JWOWWs fredsfest går ikke som planlagt. Pauly lærer Nikki forskjellen mellom rigatoni og linguini. Mike planlegger den neste famileutflukten når babyen nesten har kommet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Mike og Lauren får sitt tredje barn. Sammi fortsetter prøverørsreisen. Og resten av gjengen inntar 'The Big Apple' i en dobbeltdekker med Vinnys standup-forestilling som endestopp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Slutt på pizzaen
programme.desc: Familien drar tilbake for å gratulere den nybakte trebarnsfaren. Angelina kjører direkte i sosiale medier. Sammi er klar for en våt overraskelse.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Deenas familieferie
programme.desc: Gjengen drar tilbake til Miami for Deenas familieferie. Pauly og Sammi rotetr seg sammen for fantesteker.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: Mary loses her cool when she finds out her brother paid his friend to go out with her.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Lead, Follow or Get Out of the Way
programme.desc: Mary wants to quit the basketball team when a new girl outperforms her.
programme.sub-title: Lead, Follow or Get Out of the Way

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Rush to Judgment
programme.desc: Mary’s hurt and confused when her coach’s interest in her moves beyond the basketball court.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Stuck in the Middle with You
programme.desc: Two boys are fighting for Lucy’s affections, while Annie and Eric are fighting in a marriage-counseling group.
programme.sub-title: Stuck in the Middle with You

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Red Tape
programme.desc: A mysterious personal ad in the school paper gets Matt more calls than he can handle.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Homecoming
programme.desc: The only thing keeping Mary from getting back on the court after her knee surgery is fear.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Simon attends his first make-out party and learns more about girls than how they kiss.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Nothing Endures But Change
programme.desc: Lucy’s friend is killed in a tragic car accident, and Lucy feels that she’s to blame.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: My Kinda Guy
programme.desc: When the Camdens host a French foreign exchange student, everyone seems to be getting into trouble!

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Time to Leave the Nest
programme.desc: Matt’s bending the rules and hinting about moving out...against Annie’s wishes.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Like a Harlot
programme.desc: Mary and Lucy set themselves up for disastrous dates and Eric unwittingly fixes his son up with the “Senior Slut.”

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Boyfriends… (Part 1)
programme.desc: Mom and Dad are concerned about Mary’s involvement with her boyfriend…especially when they get some shocking test results back!

programme.title: 7th Heaven: ...And Girlfriends (Part 2)
programme.desc: In the second season finale, Matt graduates high school and get ready to move out, and Annie and Eric fear that Mary is pregnant.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: It Takes Two, Baby
programme.desc: Matt moves in with three women, and Mom and Dad find out that they're having twins!

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Drunk Like Me
programme.desc: Matt blows a gasket when his friend almost dies of alcohol poisoning in a fraternity initiation.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Cutters
programme.desc: Lucy's new best friend is hiding something and Mary stumbles upon her secret.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: The Legacy
programme.desc: Matt's reading between the lines a little too much when he thinks his attractive English professor is coming on to him.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: ...And a Nice Chianti
programme.desc: Matt stops to help a pregnant girl having car trouble and she thanks him by hijacking his car!

programme.title: Wheels on Meals NO
programme.desc: Thomas og David lar livet gå sin gang og kjører gatekjøkkenvogna deres langs gatene i Barcelona. Men hverdagen blir plutselig avbrutt når de etter et møte med en MC-gjeng treffer den vakre lommetyven Sylvia.

programme.title: To Kill with Intrigue
programme.desc: After the execution of his family by a gang, Lei Shao-feng is spared by its afflicting leader who stands in the way of him becoming reunited with his love, as does a traitorous friend, who takes advantage of their predicament.

programme.title: The Killer Meteors
programme.desc: Hua Wu Bin blir kalt The Killer Meteor takket være hans unike hemmelige kampkunster, som har gjort ham til en helt i hjemtraktene. Når en adelsmann blir forgiftet av sin kone, blir Hua leid inn for å få tak i en kur og beseire henne.

programme.title: Dragon Lord
programme.desc: Jakten på kjærligheten og rampestrekene til Dragon og barndomsvennen Buller blir avbrytt når de hører at en gjeng begynner å smugle kinesiske nasjonal skatter utenlands. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Donatello, Rafael, Michelangelo og Leonardo er muterte, grønne ninja-skilpadder som elsker pizza og lever under New Yorks gateplan. Derifra tar de opp kampen mot den ondskapsfulle forbryteren Shredder og hans armé av svartkledde krigere.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
programme.desc: Det hele begynner med en at en magisk spire transporterer deres gode venn April gjennom tid og rom, helt til samuraienes Japan. Leonardo og gjengen drar med en gang etter henne, og må nå beseire den onde Lord Naringa for å redde April.

programme.title: Shaolin Wooden Men
programme.desc: Etter å ha vært vitne til drapet på sin far, trener «Little Mute» i Shaolin-tempelet for å ta hevn, der han blir undervist av ulike lærere. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Dragon Lord
programme.desc: Jakten på kjærligheten og rampestrekene til Dragon og barndomsvennen Buller blir avbrytt når de hører at en gjeng begynner å smugle kinesiske nasjonal skatter utenlands. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles

programme.title: Becker

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Linda gets a Little Sister and learns a lesson about rebellion while John meddles in Reggies love life.

programme.desc: Becker feels old after having to renew his driver's license.

programme.desc: Becker takes a stab at being social by having a dinner party.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker fights over a phone bill, Reggie is angry over not being invited to a wedding and Bob gains too much confidence listening to self-help tapes. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker mistakenly tells the wrong family that their father has died, while Margaret and Linda deal with Linda's depressed friend Lynda. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and Linda have jury duty and Jake gets a seeing-eye-dog. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker

programme.title: Becker

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie has a panic attack about where her life is going and Becker confesses that he misses Elizabeth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker assesses his feelings for Liz when she is offered a new job in Chicago and Linda breaks-up with Gil for lying to her. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker

programme.title: Becker

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is a mentor to a student and Reggie, Bob and Jake come to a standstill in their friendship. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker

programme.title: Secret War: The SAS Italian Job
programme.desc: In 1945, during the Italian Spring offensive, SOE agent Michael Lees and SAS officer Roy Farran led a raid on German HQs at Villa Rossi and Villa Calvi. Despite orders to cancel, Farran attacked with SAS men and partisans, killing many Germans.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Traitor-in-Chief
programme.desc: Pierre Laval, once celebrated and later reviled, faced execution in 1945 for collaboration with the Nazis during Vichy France. Originally a socialist and pacifist, he fell into collaboration for power and to navigate the horrors of occupation.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Island War
programme.desc: The Marines succeed in the "island hopping" strategy against suicidal resistance. The US Navy establishes supremacy, cutting off Japan.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Hitler's Biggest Blunder
programme.desc: Hitler rules Europe triumphantly, hailed as a hero in Germany. Hitler invades the Soviet Union, promising swift victory over communism, but progress stalls. As Germany faces setbacks, Hitler retreats to his bunker in Poland, increasingly reliant on drugs.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Lightning War
programme.desc: Country after European country falls before the unstoppable German blitzkrieg.

programme.title: Secret War: The Spymistress and the French Fiasco
programme.desc: After WWII, SOE disbanded, leaving Vera Atkins to uncover fates of 118 agents, including 13 women. Many were betrayed and sent to camps; some were executed. Atkins' quest continued, marked by personal impact and delayed recognition.
programme.sub-title: The Spymistress and the French Fiasco

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: Their attack on the Soviet Union having failed, the German Army suffers a series of counter-offensives on the Eastern Front. Wehrmacht's losses are huge as the Soviets advance West.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Colt M1911, designed by John Moses Browning, is the 20th century's most influential pistol. Its .45 ACP cartridge made it the U.S. military's standard for 75 years. Wil Willis tests it to explore its stopping power.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Nazis Outfought
programme.desc: By 1944, Hitler's image as a victorious leader is crumbling. He faces a bomb plot led by Stauffenberg and Tresckow, intending to kill him and overthrow the regime. Hitler survives the bombing, triggering a brutal reprisal against conspirators.

programme.title: Secret War: The French Triple Agent
programme.desc: Operation Cockade, led by MI6's double agent Henri Dericourt in 1943, aimed to deceive Germans with sabotage. Despite efforts, Germans withdrew divisions unconvinced. Dericourt faced a post-war treason trial and died in a mysterious 1962 plane crash.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Host Wil Willis tests the Garand against the Arisaka Type 99, showcasing its impact in WWII and sniper rifles' deadly precision, from Carlos Hathcock to Craig Harrison. Witness the historic rifles that shaped warfare!

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: In Power
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's secret agenda is to rid Germany of Jews. By 1938, after creating work schemes and rearming, he orchestrates "The Night of Broken Glass," burning 1,000 synagogues and killing 91 Jews, preparing for further aggression.

programme.title: Battle Of Dunkirk
programme.desc: I et kappløp med tiden krysset over åtte hundre private båter Den engelske kanal for å redde de havarerte soldatene fra infernoet på strendene ved Dunkerque. Se de enkelte veteranenes ekstraordinære heltemot i et slag som endret andre verdenskrigs forløp.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Overlord
programme.desc: After a careful campaign of disinformation that throws the German defenders off-guard, the Western Allies finally land on Normandy.France is liberated.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Factories of Death
programme.desc: Året 1942 skal bli det mest betydningsfulle i "Den Endelige Løsningen", ettersom nazistene nå begynner å gjennomgå Vest-Europa og til og med tar jøder fra steder så fjernt som de britiske Kanaløyene.

programme.title: Secret War: The Aristocrat and the Balkan Communists
programme.desc: Fitzroy Maclean, an MP and WWII spy, supported Tito's Communist partisans in Yugoslavia against the Germans, forging a lasting friendship and honored at Tito's funeral post-war.
programme.sub-title: The Aristocrat and the Balkan Communists

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Belgian Collaborator
programme.desc: Leon Degrelle, a charismatic Belgian leader, joined the Nazis and led Die Wallonien on the Eastern Front. Despite no military background, he earned the Knight's Cross for valor. He recruited 4000 more for the SS, defending Berlin until April 1945.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 1
programme.desc: Dannii Minogue joins host Elle Macpherson and Tyson Beckford as 28 hopefuls begin their battle for a modelling contract with a leading agency. The girls pull out all the stops but only half of them will survive the cull.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 2
programme.desc: The contestants head to the National Wedding Show at Birmingham's NEC to be coached in the art of the catwalk by model Jade Parfitt.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 3
programme.desc: It's time for the contestants to receive their makeovers and host Elle Macpherson embraces the challenge by opting for a new look herself. After their transformations, the girls pose like professional gymnasts with Olympian Louis Smith.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 4
programme.desc: Chemistry with the camera is imperative for a top model, so to separate the sizzlers from the fizzlers, the girls must pose with male models.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 5
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson shares her top tips in a modelling workshop before Tyson challenges the girls to shine on a shoot in an ex-coal mine.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 6
programme.desc: The final ten sample the flamboyant world of high fashion in a catwalk show with unusual accessories, before bearing all for a nude shoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 7
programme.desc: The contestants demonstrate their acting skills in milk commercials before taking part in a photoshoot inspired by classic children's stories.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 8
programme.desc: Journalist Hilary Alexander quizzes the would-be catwalk stars on the industry they are so eager to become part of. The winners are treated to a party with former contestants including last year's winner Letitia Herod.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 9
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson enrols the seven remaining contestants in a Fashion Targets Breast Cancer catwalk event for their biggest showcase yet and they also take part in a beauty shoot with a cosmetics company.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 10
programme.desc: The six remaining girls arrive in Barbados and hit the waves for a surfing-themed tourism advert. The action remains on the water for a boat-based photoshoot with Dannii Minogue and a leading hair-care brand, ahead of the dreaded elimination.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 11
programme.desc: The final five star in a music video with Bajan pop group Cover Drive and have to learn a complicated dance routine, before Elle Macpherson challenges the contestants to model jewellery in a photoshoot set in a limestone cavern.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 12
programme.desc: The four remaining girls compete for a place in next week's final, demonstrating what they have learnt by styling themselves for a Bajan magazine cover shoot. After that, Tyson Beckford sets the contestants a challenge at a sugar plantation.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 13
programme.desc: The three remaining contestants take part in their final photoshoot a Caribbean carnival-themed catwalk show infront of an audience of industry bigwigs. Elle Macpherson, Tyson Beckford and Dannii Minogue then select the winner.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Based on the hit US reality show America's Next Top Model this UK version presented by Lisa Snowdon follows the latest group of hopefuls through their journey to becoming Britain's newest 'Top Model'.

programme.title: Dare, Dream, Dominate.: The Beginning
programme.desc: Begyndelsen. Mark O Madsen er stoppet som fighter – men kampen er langt fra slut. Sammen med Maria sætter han alt på spil i forsøget på at skabe Danmarks største MMA-show. Næsten allerede fra første skridt er udfordringerne overvældende.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Andi hires a pretty, young babysitter, Sophia (Victoria Justice), to watch the kids, and gets jealous when her daughter, Kate, goes to her instead for advice.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam discovers that the pastor he hired for their wedding was a phony and he and Andi aren't really married, he scrambles to find a way to fix it before she finds out.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam needs to hire a new project manager, Andi accuses Adam of unconscious bias after he only interviews men for the job.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam notices his Dad's increasingly forgetful behavior, he struggles with how to approach him to discuss it.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When the kids won't do their chores, Adam and Andi decide to go on strike too.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam thinks Kate's boyfriend, Tyler (Griffin Gluck), is a pothead, he decides to confront Tyler but doesn't get the support he expects from Andi.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam takes his kids to work with him for the day, they accidentally give his biggest client lice. Also, Andi feels like a bad mom when she's the only one in the family not to get lice.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi agree on a present-free Valentine's Day, Adam gives the gift he planned for Andi to his mother instead.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi try to get back in their neighbors' good graces after no one shows up to their potluck.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi are caught off guard by unexpected expenses, they each decide to give up a luxury to pay them off.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi gets Bev (Swoosie Kurtz) a spot volunteering at the hospital, Joe becomes bored and starts spending too much time with Adam.
programme.sub-title: Guess Who's Coming to Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi and Adam disagree about Kate attending a dance with an older boy, Adam tries to outsmart Andi to win the argument.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam attempts to organize a birthday dinner for Andi and he discovers that managing guests isn't easy.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi lose footage of an intimate moment they accidentally recorded, they have to track it down before anyone can see it.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Bruno Menard is well-known for his 'sharp' dishes. Will he able to win this battle of escargot with Iron Chef Sakai?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen must fend off his own best friend as a challenger. Shozo Miyamoto serves up a Szechuan and Shanghai-cuisine battle to his old friend.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: From Arima Onsen comes the vice president of Japan Chef's Association, Challenger Tadamichi Ota. Will Iron Chef Sakai be able to capture a victory in this battle of octopus?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The head chef of the two-star restaurant L'Amphycles, Philippe Groult is determined to defeat Iron Chef Sakai in this oyster onslaught.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chairman Kaga pits two of his Iron Chefs against each other for the annual Mr. Iron Chef Tournament. Chen and Sakai go head-to-head for the chance to challenge the defending champion.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The heated battle between Chen and Sakai reveals Chen as the winner, who now has to go against the reigning Mr. Iron Chef, Michiba.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chen takes on Michiba in the Mr. Iron Chef Tournament. Will Chen take the honor and title of this year's Mr. Iron Chef, or will Michiba get to retire with a second Mr. Iron Chef title?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Jinyi Gao, the head chef of Grand Hotel, Taiwan's number-one hotel, goes against Iron Chef Chen, who has never lost except in the New Year's battle. Who will reign supreme in this shellfish showdown?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Curry powder is a difficult seasoning to use as a main ingredient. How will Iron Chef Sakai tackles this theme ingredient against Challenger Hidetoshi Ushimaru?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Who will get stung when a dangerous-looking fish is this week's theme ingredient? Challenger Hiroshi Yamanobe is a chef from the seaside and determined to win, no matter what.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Kandagawa sends his challenger Jinichi Tateyama to take on his mentor in French cuisine, Iron Chef Sakai. The heat will be on as Kandagawa's faction seeks victory.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Will Iron Chef Chen be ready for Takaya Nakazawa, a challenger from Shizuoka who happens to know everything about Chinese vegetarian dishes?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Nakamura makes his Kitchen Stadium debut. His first opponent, Kiyoshi Suzuki, is from the world-famous Club des Trentes school of cooking.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: As a leading figure in Japanese cuisine, Tatsujiro Yoshida has tackled the rough waves of the sea of Japan. Will Yoshida have what it takes when surf is up at Kitchen Stadium?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Senji Osada deploys 'vacuum cooking,' a French cooking technique born in the 21st century. Will Senji have what it takes in his battle of scallop dishes with Iron Chef Sakai?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Kunbi Lin's former battle at Kitchen Stadium against the legendary Iron Chef Nakamura finished in a draw. Will Lin be able to claim victory this time?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The long-awaited challenger Katsuaki Mori has been awarded the prestigious 'Chevalier du Taste-Fromage,' France's highest honor for cheese.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: It's only rookie Iron Chef Nakamura's third battle. Will he be able to withstand Challenger Toyoaki Suganuma's egg challenge?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Gyobun Hou is ready to chop the lettuce with confidence against Iron Chef Chen. Who will reign supreme when we witness this legendary leafy battle?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chefs always have trouble with female challengers. How will Iron Chef Nakamura fight back against Katsuko Nanao's affectionate home-cooked dishes?

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Cap'ing-off the Challenger
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Mike’s 1939 Hudson Coupe-Convertible is the only survivor of three that were built. He wants Fantomworks to restore it to original condition – even though nobody knows what that looks like. Jim wants his 1970 Nova to be the ultimate dragster.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Firepower Un-Boxed
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are hard at work on the 1976 Trans Am. The 1972 Corvette is getting a custom paint job. The 66 Mustang needs a tune up.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: A 1917 Overland will be FantomWorks oldest restoration, if they can solve this jigsaw puzzle of rotted wood and rusted steel. Dan buys a 1968 Camaro on the internet for his wife, Malissa, and finds out that the car is in extremely poor condition.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: At FantomWorks, there are 85 cars being worked on and multiple owners who expect miracles. From a vintage motorcycle to getting a 1970 GTO ready for a returning vet, Dan burns the midnight oil to get cars out the door so new arrivals can take their place.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Mike thought his 1967 Chevy K10 Pick Up needed paint improvement. Dan quickly realizes that the car needs much more. Nobody restores 1970 Opel Kadett, so there are no parts anywhere for Harry’s car that needs a lot of everything.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: The 1966 Mustang that was purchased at Mechum Auctions a year ago needs a tune up. The team is in the paint booth working on another 1966 mustang.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: When the 1941 Buick Coupe rolls into FantomWorks, it is the worst possible combination: a very difficult car and very demanding owner. Janelle wants her KZ-750 transformed into a cool stripped down ‘café’ bike – a challenge for FantomWorks new bike shop.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Steve wants to run his 1954 Oldsmobile in a thousand-mile road race. Dan faces a tight budget, a tough schedule and race rules. Jim wants Fantomworks to bring his 1977 Spitfire out of a coma; but Dan puts his foot down when safety issues are discovered.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: The owner of a C10 pick-up wants a full frame off restoration and as Dan predicted, things get ugly when they peel off the paint. A Heinkel came in with mismatched scooter parts hiding an incredibly rare car - which makes parts almost impossible to find.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: A 1977 Corvette Stingray arrives with seven layers of paint and too many problems to count. The restoration makes no sense, but Dan takes it. A 1965 Cobra is brought in for a simple wiring job. Then, the owner decides to wrap the car like a fighter jet.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: This time, on Muscle Cars of Texas, Vinnie and the team are working on a 63 Z06, 59 Ford Pickup and a 69 Chevy Malibu.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Cuda 'Tat
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Tom asks Dan to find him a rare 1967 Camaro Convertible with factory AC. But when Dan finds the Unicorn, the car is too good to cut up. Dave wants Dan to build a safe, all stock 1971 Datsun, but the car has been badly damaged by previous restoration work.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: FantomWorks epic 4 year long wrestling match with the 1961 International Harvester Metro concludes with an incredible, one-of-a-kind van. Ray wants his 1969 ZL1 to match the number 68 rally car, but he needs Dan’s rare Winters stamped 427 COPO motor.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie is working on replacing the gages on this 1975 Corvette. The rocker panels on the 1964 Corvette are ready to be reinstalled.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Dan's team take on the restorations of a 1966 Volkswagen Beetle and a 1976 TR6 convertible. The TR6 looks bad, but Dan sees hidden potential for it to become a rare 'survivor' car that still has its original paint and fixtures.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Daniel wants FantomWorks to swap out the V6 of his 1968 Mustang Convertible with the V8 from a donor car. Stacia and Eugenia need Dan’s help to transform their quirky 1962 Citroen 2CV from a ‘problem child’ to a reliable car.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Nikkos wants a spectacular 1968 Mustang Fastback resto-mod. The all-metal masterpiece catches the eye of someone who wants it at any cost. Jim and Arlene want to enjoy their 45th anniversary in the same 1969 Firebird they rode in on their wedding day.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Mike wants Dan to make his prized Mach 1 even more of a muscle car. Richard brings FantomWorks the first ‘his and hers’ restoration – a Sunbeam Tiger and a Fiat Spider – but as Dan soon discovers; the challenges of the two cars are not equal.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Rocket Method
programme.desc: Ronnie O'Sullivan teaches snooker fundamentals, guiding viewers through the essential skills and techniques to improve their game, the Rocket Method.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 er den nye hurtige og spennende versjonen av spillet! Kom og se ukentlige konkurranser, arkiv spill, studio segmenter og mye mer.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Featuring coverage of the World Seniors Snooker 900 tournament.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Featuring coverage of the World Seniors Snooker 900 tournament.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker legends compete in a one-day spectacular at Goffs venue in County Kildare. Ken Doherty and Jimmy White compete in the final.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker legends compete in a one-day spectacular at Connexin Live, Hull. Groups A & B, Igor Figueiredo Vs Ken Doherty and Jimmy White Vs Tony Drago.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker legends compete in a one-day spectacular at Connexin Live, Hull. Groups A and B, Stephen Hendry vs Tony Drago and Barry Pinches vs Igor Figueiredo.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker legends compete in a one-day spectacular at Connexin Live, Hull. It is Semi-Final time! Ken Doherty Vs Jimmy White and Tony Drago Vs Igor Figueiredo.
