programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A district attorney clashes with a lawyer who agrees to defend a friend charged with stealing.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark returns to Oakland to become a police officer again and is reunited with his old partner. However, he discovers his old beat has become a storm of racial hatred.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan hopes that he'll be released from his duties to be reunited with his former wife when she passes away.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan hopes that he'll be released from his duties to be reunited with his former wife when she passes away.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A war correspondent finds himself imprisoned and facing execution. Meanwhile, Jonathan and Mark show him what's he's missed during his life by putting work ahead of family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A Hawaiian singer learns to overcome self-pity after being disabled in a truck accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help a teenage cancer patient named Lee who wants to save the dolphins.
programme.sub-title: A Dolphin Song for Lee - Part 1

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Lee's cancer is now in remission. She gets back to work on her save-the-dolphins campaign.
programme.sub-title: A Dolphin Song for Lee - Part 2

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan must stop an angel who's back on Earth with the intention of breaking up his son's marriage.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A chauvinistic coach doesn't want a female wide receiver on his junior-high football team.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark's friend is running for public office, and he's a very honest man. But things get out of hand when an opponent tries to win by going after his son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps Commander Michaels to deal with flashbacks of Vietnam; he also tries to convince her to go to therapy. Mark deals with his fear of flying.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A veterans' support group becomes a lifeline for Commander Michaels, who continues to deal with post-traumatic stress disorder. Meanwhile, she discovers that her son David came into the emergency room due to an accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A pastor must follow a church council's decision to fire most of the staff at the school because they're not Christian.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark attends his high school class reunion and learns that some memories are bittersweet for his old friends.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A teenage girl tells school reporters that a driver came on to her right before the bus got into an accident. She may not be telling the truth. Jonathan tries to teach the news writers the correct way to report a story.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The problems of the handicapped are addressed when an amputee joins a crusade after a false fire alarm.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: With Matt out of town, Doc only has Chester to protect him when his life is threatened.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: So Long, Dora, So Long
programme.desc: As Jim Kelly and Dora Hand prepare to wed, Jim Rellance from Texas hopes to marry Dora. Dora tells him to find a younger girl and Earp tells him to leave Dodge City.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt's Brothers Join Up
programme.desc: After the death of Old Man Clanton, Doc Holliday hatches a scheme involving Wyatt's brothers to help him in his desire to create an internal fight among the Clanton gang members.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Dodge City Gets a New Marshal
programme.desc: Earp takes the job of Dodge City Marshal. He arrives to find the Sheriff and his deputy under siege and the men on Front Street trying to kill him.
programme.sub-title: Dodge City Gets a New Marshal

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt and Chester act as decoys to ambush outlaws that are masking their crimes as those of renegade Indians.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A dishonest gambler uses a mentally challenged man in a plot against Matt.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Requiem for Old Man Clanton
programme.desc: Wyatt tries to put a stop to ongoing border skirmishes between the Clanton gang and Mexican bandits.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Peter arrives in Sacramento to revive his family's fortune but learns Phineas Colby has monopolized the town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Zack and Zeke, slaves from Louisville, seek to buy their freedom by digging for gold.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: John is given the task of turning a small group of Apache men into a force that can aid the U.S. Calvary.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A singer wants to give up the fame and return home.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A young outlaw is reformed by the kindness and help of an elderly female junk collector.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An outlaw holds up a stagecoach carrying a murderer to trial.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Farmer Carlo Farelli wants to marry beautiful saloon girl Della but must first deal with a town gangster.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Hole Up
programme.desc: Wells Fargo asks Earp to go undercover into the badlands to capture Blackie Saunders wanted for a robbery and murder.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Loyalty
programme.desc: Doc Holliday hits a long winning streak at the card tables and winds up with stock in a mine and railroad, both of which soon have a tremendous jump in value.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Sam Kee, ostracized because he's Chinese, finds refuge at a fort after saving a soldier's life.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A notorious Apache is in the area and a local captain's son is missing.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A boy runs away from home and into the arms of an outlaw after a falling out with his father.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An untamed nature girl develops a liking for Marshal Matt Dillon and isn't shy about expressing it.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Gunfight at the O.K. Corral
programme.desc: Earp recalls in court the details of the day when the Clanton gang rode into Tombstone to shoot it out with the Earps.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Cowpoke Curt Morrison and pal Josh locate a spring on Native land soon to be opened to homesteaders.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Louie Pheeters is found intoxicated beside a dying man and, unable to remember what took place, is accused of murder.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt Meets Doc Holliday
programme.desc: Earp is looking for information on Mike Roarke at Shanssey's Camp where he finds Doc Holliday may be able to help. Doc refuses as he has his own agenda with Roarke.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Warpath
programme.desc: An Army officer is captured by Pawnee Indians who have left the reservation and bought faulty guns.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Colonel Lounsberry is selected by General Custer to be the only newspaperman to travel with the troops.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Old Jake
programme.desc: Earp spots old buffalo hunter Jake Caster in a saloon. Jake now lives with his wife's tribe, the Cheyenne, but Earp wonders if Jake has changed his ways.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Doc Holliday, looking for cash to finance his gambling, tries to con a banker out of $20,000.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Fortitude
programme.desc: Earp is invited to speak at the Cattlemen's Convention at the Dodge City Opera House. But a source tells Kate Holliday that it is a setup by Texas cattlemen to kill Earp.

programme.title: Harlequin: Loving Evangeline
programme.desc: Robert får vite om sin brors dødelige båtulykke som får han til å dra for å hente liket. Der møter han Evie Shaw som er eieren av marinaen. Han blir besatt av sin brors mistenkelige død... og av Evie. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Recipe for Revenge
programme.desc: Caterer Carly Westin agrees to prepare a feast for a friend who wants to impress a man. But the couple is killed when she is in the kitchen. When police investigator Jack Brannigan gets involved, he must protect Carly before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Harlequin: A Change of Place
programme.desc: When troubled twin Dominique asks her bookish sister Kimberly to assume her role for a month as a glamorous Parisian model, Kimberly hesitates.

programme.title: Harlequin: Another Woman
programme.desc: Da Lisa våkner på sykehuset, husker hun ingenting:at mannen hennes Paul vil skille seg fra henne, eller at hun ble brutalt slått og etterlatt for å dø. Når Paul tar henne med hjem, må Lisa lære alt på nytt. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Treacherous Beauties
programme.desc: Anne mistenker at broren Alans død ikke var en ulykke. Hun begynner å jobbe for en familie som kan ha hatt en finger med i spillet, men blir snart forelsket i den eldste sønn. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Broken Lullaby
programme.desc: En foreldreløs jentes (Mel Harris) jakt etter fortiden begynner med et barndomsbilde av henne selv ved siden av en sjelden spilledåse, og fører henne til en lokkende skattejeger. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: At the Midnight Hour
programme.desc: En vakker barnepike(Liz) fanger oppmerksomheten Richard, en enkemann og vitenskapsmann, og hans begavede sønn Andy. Liz' liv blir truet når hun kommer for nær sannheten om hvem som drepte den tidligere hans frue. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: The Awakening
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter who's tracking one of her tenants convinces Sara McAllister to team up with him, they start an adventure into the dangerous world of international espionage and love.

programme.title: Harlequin: This Matter of Marriage
programme.desc: Arkitektene Hallie og Donnalee arbeider med et stort byggeprosjekt for en eksentrisk milliardær, Adam Barr. Hallieshar lett etter drømmemannen, finner ham plutselig rett ved siden av. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Hard to Forget
programme.desc: Privatdetektiv Max etterforsker Sandra Applewhites død og er overbevist om at hennes ektemann John Gilman drepte henne. Når han møter Sandras tvillingsøster Nicky, ber han henne om hjelp til å avsløre Gilman. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood hodet høyt for å unngå 'Baller fra oven', tar et lett kaotisk bad og opplever full 'Badekarinvasjon' og får hører den ufiltrerte sannheten av 'Søte små kritikere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' morer Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg i parkeringsanlegg med 'Garasjegøy', ser at avløpsåpnere kan brukes til mer enn kun nummer to i 'Mangefasetterte avløpsåpnere' og lurer døden i 'Nesten knust'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg noen ordentlige 'Foreldreoverraskelser', ruller med noen skikkelig 'Dediserte inlineløpere' og mister litt kontroll i 'Radioustyrlige'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjemmer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Carly Aquilino drinken for Drikketyver', ser nye merkelige antrekk i 'Bærbare rariteter' og får andrehånds skrubbsår av trafikanter som følger regelen 'Se i begge retninger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og gjest Carly Aquilino trappene med barn som gjør noen 'Mini-feilsteg', tester senger med 'Madrassprøving' og lokaliserer alle de løse skruene i 'Oppussingsanger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XL
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' avdekker Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood farene med døråpninger i 'Dørdengt' før de drar til havs på 'Kræsjcruise' og avslutter med noen mestere i forkledning i 'Bykamuflasje'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slåss Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino mot vinden i 'Aggressiv luft', sliter med spisepinnene i 'Fomlepinner' og viser fram rare evner i 'Ferdigheter er ferdigheter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino nærmere på utsatte besteforeldre i 'Barnebarnskader', får ødelagt humøret av 'Stemningssenkere' og har det gøy med litt 'Landsens avslapping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran sjansen på å ta seg en lur i 'Blottlagte blunder', finner nye bruksområder i tillegg til hockey i 'Nyttekøller' og får seg en trøkk fra oven med 'Takattakk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg en kakk i hodet når de er 'Uten høydebevissthet', får multitaskingeksamen ved 'Simultankapasitets-universitetet og betrakter barn som dras i 'Hunder med barneslep'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino litt konkurransesugne i 'Utilsiktede hjulskader', opplever T-banekaos på 'Ville tog' og morer seg stort med 'Skjelettkompiser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' forårsaker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran alvorlige skader når de spiller 'Hjemmegolf', møter bygningsarbeidere som morer seg med 'Jobbskøyere' og blir vitner til vindens kraft i 'Tatt av vinden'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' deltar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran i timen med 'Forelesningssabotører', stopper hjorter som foretar 'Bukkattakk' og flipper helt når de får seg en 'Turntrøkk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' sklir Rob, Steelo og gjest Karrueche Tran rundt i gatene fordi de er 'Dårlig til å drifte', tar seg litt snacks med folk som liker å 'Småspise i alle situasjoner' og holder festen i gang med 'Bursdagsbomber'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' triller Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran ut på skumruller i 'Fatal foam', tar begrepet "hot date" til neste nivå med 'Ildfulle utekvelder' og kommer litt for nær de verste flysetenaboene i 'Ekle passasjerer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' leker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran utryddere i 'Kryppatruljen', blir spesielt følsomme og feller 'Kjærlighetstårer' og skater ute i det ville i 'Bli i parken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran nye farer ved å drikke i 'Ølskutt', møter folk som blir oppglødd når de går i bakken i 'Krasjglad' og fortsetter å kjøre i 'Kan ikke og vil ikke stoppe'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Karrueche Tran trygg avstand til 'Kanonballknusere', bommer på svingslagforsøk med 'Luftslag' og forbløffes av folk som beveger seg så smidig at 'Det kan være magi'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz ute og henger med noen 'Kule utkastere', feirer folk med hodeskaller av stål i 'Knuserskaller' og skitner seg til når de tar seg et par 'Jordbad'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz farene ved å bli oppmuntret i 'Dette fikser du ikke', sjekker noen teknologifiender i 'Robothatere' før de møter noen arge englendere i 'Britisk raseri'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' skyter Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz rett i kurven med stil med 'Ballfintere', oppdager at enkelte dager er 'Umiddelbart dårlige dager' og blir vitner til søt justis på veien i 'Veikarma'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og gjestende vert Rocsi Diaz veldig oppmerksomme men gjør likevel 'Forsiktige feil', mister taket på 'Overdimensjonert last' og drar sin vei med stil i 'Smidige avskjeder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' flipper Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz ut i 'Halvt baklengs', setter seg på 'Billige stoler' og ser hvem som får seg en 'Dekksmekk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tilbringer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz en smertefull dag på vannet i 'Båtknekt', går ut og blir 'Terrassevrak' og manifesterer en del smeller i 'Dårlig tiltrekning'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' passer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Rocsi Diaz godt på bakdelene sine, så de ikke blir 'Rumpestukket', tar rare omveier for å unngå 'Ville veisperringer' og går tilbake til Robs røtter med 'Skaterhatere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John II
programme.desc: I kveldens episode av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John nifse haier i 'Finneskrekk', vil ikke investere i folk som er 'Ikke banebrytende' og finner ut hva som skjer når man tar 'Slurvete snarveier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John III
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John pengerådgivning av 'Mini-Daymonds', møter noen rasende bier som skaper 'Biebataljer' og tester produkter i 'Prøv før du kjøper'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood rådløse på sjøen og blir helt 'Havkorka', kaster for mange erteposer i 'Villvest-Cornhole' og må jobbe med egen tålmodighet fordi de 'Avskyr å vente'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' klatrer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz i feil trær med 'Døde greiner', klatrer opp på feil person i 'Dårlige skulderholdere' og blir intense på kontoret med 'Ekstrem kontorstoling'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Paige Desorbo se noen ryggradpirrende fall i 'Ryggknekkere', hører hvordan Rob sparte penger for å flytte til California i 'Lagerleker' og avslutter med smerte ved vannet i 'Tørr landing'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' vil Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Paige DeSorbo unngå å få nesen ut av ledd i 'Neseborsjokk', unngår små, gira råtasser i 'Helvete på plasthjul' og kliner til med noen frampå eldre damer i 'Sugne bestemødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood sparkesykkel-kollisjoner til et høyere nivå med 'Sparkesykkelspark', konfronterer søppeldagen direkte med 'Vanskelig søppel' og snur uhell til hell i 'Utilsiktede seiere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut håret med 'Partyrotter', ler av noen ordentlige 'Krimklovner' og tar en titt på ulike 'Krasjkamera'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood X
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å bære alt i én omgang i 'For mye å bære', slår seg løs på do med 'Båskriminalitet' og er ekstremt galante som i 'De beste kjærestene'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis farene ved stiger i 'Stigekræsj', føler at de må følge fulle venner hjem i 'Fylleleveranser' og oppdager at ikke alle maskoter er like i 'Maskotproblemer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood verdens verste smerter i 'Halebeinbrutalitet', opplever at allergisesongen er ille i 'Naturlig snørrete' og drar langt ut på landet og fester i 'Partylåver'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis mellom snøbrettkjørere og skiløpere i 'Snøkrig', slåss mot sulten på verste måte i 'Nattmatkatastrofe' og sykler på feil trær i 'Sykkel møter bark'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kaster Rob, Steelo og Lexi Rivera seg inn i spillet med noen 'Nattatleter', tar en slumsete drink laget av noen 'Sleivete miksologer' og feirer irriterende forhold i 'Elsker å hate dem'.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons drømmer om en brann potensielt kan bidra til å løse mystiske brannrelaterte dødsfall. I tillegg lurer Devalos på neste steg i karrieren.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons naboer blir rasende når en dømt seksualforbryter flytter inn i området, men Allisons visjoner får henne til å tvile på at han til og med er skyldig.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når en mann blir drept av et tog, har Allison en drøm som varsler et identisk drap.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir bekymret når hun oppdager brorens nyvunne suksess.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: En desperat mann ber Allison om å hjelpe ham med å finne sin savnede kone.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison og Joe tar fatt på nye karrierer som leder dem i forskjellige retninger.

programme.title: Medium: Pilot
programme.desc: Allison fortsetter å ha "drømmer" som ektemannen Joe er fast bestemt på å motbevise. I et drastisk tiltak sender han "drømmene" hennes til forskjellige rettshåndhevende myndigheter.

programme.title: Medium: Suspicions and Certainties
programme.desc: Statsadvokaten i Phoenix ringer Allison for hennes hjelp med å velge en jury. Han trenger en jury som garantert vil gi en skyldig dom og ilegge dødsstraff.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison får en mindre hjernerystelse når hun sklir i badekaret. Når hun skal ta en MR, har hun en merkelig visjon om en mann hun nettopp har møtt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har problemer med å være upartisk i en sak når hun utvikler morsfølelser for en tenåringsgutt som er anklaget for å ha drept sin tidligere sjef.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison hjelper statsadvokaten med å finne en nær venns savnede bror. Hun blir paranoid om antiterroragenter fra regjeringen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer at broren hennes var involvert i et lokalt bankran. Mistankene hennes vokser når han uventet dukker opp i byen og blir involvert med en svindler.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison etterforsker tilsynelatende tilfeldige drap, og setter familien hennes i fare. Bridgette må holde en presentasjon om morens jobb for klassen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Tre jenter blir funnet drept. Allisons syner kobler etterforsker Scanlon til saken.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer gjentatte ganger om en kvinne som blir overvåket av en fremmed mann på soverommet hennes.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison er opptatt med å etterforske dødsfallet til en lokal lege når en mann som hevder å være "Døden" begynner å dukke opp i synene hennes, noe som får henne til å frykte at hun snart skal dø.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om livet hun kunne hatt hvis hun hadde blitt advokat, som hun opprinnelig ønsket å bli.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har tilbakevendende drømmer om fortiden hennes, noe som forårsaker merkelige og sjokkerende endringer i hennes nåværende liv.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Devalos etterforsker dødsfallet til en av hans nære venner og får hjelp av Allison, som har hatt urovekkende drømmer om en ung kvinne som ser ut til å være besatt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Tiden er viktig når en misfornøyd arbeider som ikke har noe å tape, tar Joe og tre andre som gisler.

programme.desc: An ailing young stranger brings new life to town, but only Dr. Mike can save him.

programme.desc: Matthew decides to run for sheriff after Colorado Springs is hit by a crime wave.

programme.desc: Sully leads the rescue when a boy is kidnapped by a mountain man; Dr. Mike's pregnancy is in danger when she does not take care of herself.

programme.desc: Sully leaves the unruly rescue party to hunt for Matthew on his own; Dr. Mike's least favorite physician takes over her practice.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blakes reise til Caracas for å befri Caress mislykkes. Dex frir til Alexis og blir avvist. Dex går med på å hjelpe Blake med å få Caress ut av fengsel.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake og Dex greier å befri Caress fra fengselet, og hun vender tilbake til Denver med en sterk hevnlyst.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Caress sverger på å ta hevn for årene i fengsel. Michael Culhane bruker Zach Powers for å kjøpe opp tretti prosent av «The Crater»-prosjektet. Sammy Jo forteller en fortvilet Clay at hun er gravid.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Caress fortsetter å utpresse Emily Fallmont. Clay, som lider av skyldfølelse, frir til Sammy Jo, i ekte Las Vegas-stil. Michael blir tvunget til å fortelle Amanda sannheten.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: En døende Emily bønnfaller Blake om å bruke brevet hun skrev for å få slutt på Alexis og Bens forræderi. Clay og Sammy Jo gifter seg. Nick Kimball prøver utrettelig å vinne Dominiques gunst.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake bruker Emilys brev for å finne en måte å gjenvinne imperiet på. Sammy Jo finner ut at hun ikke er gravid, men holder det hemmelig for Clay.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis gir Blake kontrollen over Denver-Carrington og herskapshuset igjen. Ben kjemper mot Alexis for like rettigheter over Colbyco. Michael Culhane og Alexis allierer seg mot Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo frykter at hun vil miste Clay hvis han finner ut om den falske graviditeten. Adam oppdager hvem den mystiske kvinnen som plager Ben er.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Ben redder Blake igjen ved å dra ham i sikkerhet. Begge unnslipper den ødeleggende eksplosjonen. Blake lider av hukommelsestap etter eksplosjonen.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo forteller Clay at hun vil annullere ekteskapet. Domique blir angrepet av banditter som truer henne til å samarbeide med sjefen deres.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle mistenker at Blake ennå har følelser for Alexis. Blake og Ben skværer opp. Amanda drar til London.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Clay signerer motvillig dokumentene for å annullere ekteskapet med Sammy Jo. Blake overtaler Leslie Carrington til å bli i Denver og gi Ben en ny sjanse.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystina mister bevisstheten mens legene kjemper for redde henne. Krystle avviser Alexis oppriktige bekymring for Krystinas helse.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystina flys til California og venter på en donor til den livsviktige hjertetransplantasjonen. Leslie flytter inn i Carrington-huset.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystinas eneste håp knuses da moren til hjertedonoren trekker tilbake tillatelsen til operasjonen. Leslie og Clay går motvillig med på å samarbeide.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystina ønskes velkommen hjem etter en så langt vellykket hjertetransplantasjon. En rik eiendomsmagnat prøver å vinne Alexis' gunst.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam glir stadig lenger unna Dana og familien sin når tvilen rundt slekskapet med Carrington-familien går innpå ham. Sarah Curtis fortsetter å forme et unaturlig bånd med Krystina.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sarah syr en kjole til Krystina som er identisk med en kjole datteren hennes hadde på seg. Sammy Jo og Steven gir etter for lidenskapen.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är det dags för Rickard Olsson att ta sig till Normandie för att besöka de historiska platserna från Andra Världskriget.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här åker Rickard Olsson ned med Springtime Travel för att testa på en av deras träningssresor.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här besöker Rickard Olsson, Almunécar. Han tar sig ut på kulturhistoriska platser såväl som världsberömda vingårdar eller träningsresor över hela världen. Missa inte den enda unika och skräddarsydda reseprogrammet för dig som är 55-plus.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är det dags för att ta sig ned till Schweiz för att prova på att åka med den berömda Glaciärexpressen.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard tar sig ned till Polen för en rundresa till Krakow och Warzawa

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard tar sig med på en Whiskeyresa och tågresa till Skottland

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard reser till storstaden London för att se vad den har att erbjuda. Följ med honom när han utforskar julmarknader, åker skridskor och besöker världsberömda platser.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Följ med Rickard på en resa till Rostock för den perfekta julekänslan.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Følg med oss på resa til Afrika.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången befinner vi oss i Kroatien tillsammans med More Sailing som arrangerar seglingsresor över hela världen.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Programmet leds av en av Sveriges allra mest rutinerade teveprofiler, Rickard Olsson. Han tar sig till platser, städer och områden som han är nyfiken på. Missa inte den enda unika och skräddarsydda reseprogrammet för dig som är 55-plus.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Det är dags för ett nytt avsnitt av reseprogrammet "Nyfiken På" med Rickard Olsson på afterworktv.se Denna gången åker vi till Italien för att följa med Rolf Flyg och Buss på en vinresa

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Vi besöker Gardasjön i Italien och får en fantastisk cykeltur.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är Rickard Olsson i Berlin tillsammans med Scandorama och deras gruppresa. Tillsammans med gruppen åker han på dagsutflykter till historiska platser men får även uppleva det nya Berlins mest populära och trendiga områden.

programme.title: Inter 24/7
programme.desc: Inter, en av verdens mest berømte fotballklubber, åpner arkivet sitt for en helt ny kanal med ikoniske Nerazzurri-legender og historiske sportsøyeblikk. Fra klubbens storhetstid til de siste triumfene, som førte til den «andre gylne stjernen».

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: To datere kjemper om kompensere for balansen i huset etter sjokket over avfallsplassen. En maskeradefest genererer en sæskilt nakenglede, og for mye tungebevegelser presser et par til bristegrensen.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Et par settes på den ytterste prøven da nok en nybegynner kommer. De uten sterke forbindelser føler seg også sårbare.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Fjærene blir rufset til i en ny kamp om jentene. Dom og Mike fortsetter videre. Og en fest sendt fra himmelen, ender i en helvetes overraskelse.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Ti singler kler av seg i kjærlighetens navn, og kaster seg inn i en vågal datingerfaring. Nakne begynner de å bli kjent, før forbindelsene settes på prøve.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Den første nakne nybegynneren truer umiddelbart forbindelsene. Mens visse forbindelser vokser, tviles det på andre, noe som skaper spenning før en dater dumpes permanent.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Daterne søker stadig forbindelser etter den første dumpingen. Det er fritt fram for nye forbindelser da andre brytes. En omgang 'Dare or Bare' gjør at en dater angrer mens tiden tikker for ei av jentene.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Det slår gnister når sjalusi og konkurranse tilspisser seg. Et par tar forbindelsen til et nytt nivå, mens tvilens skjær sprer seg over det andre. Før en dramatisk vri på avfallsplassen.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: A transporter accident places Captain Kirk's landing party in an alternate universe, where the Enterprise is in the service of a barbarically brutal empire.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk attempts to assist a primitive people that are ruled over by a computer named Vaal.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The USS Enterprise encounters the wrecked USS Constellation and its distraught commodore.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Very alien visitors to our galaxy attempt to connect with human consciousness but miss, winding up tapping into the regions of human nightmares instead.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise is taken over by a group of androids who are working for Kirk's old nemesis, Harry Mudd.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: While returning to the Enterprise aboard the shuttlecraft, Kirk, Spock, McCoy and a seriously ill Federation diplomat find themselves kidnapped by an energized cloud.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Tensions run high when the Enterprise transports ambassadors to the Babel conferences.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise crew becomes embroiled in a local power struggle on a tribal planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: A landing party, including the command staff, is infected with a disease that causes rapid aging and senility.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must deal with a creature from Kirk's past that feeds on human blood.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk and the Enterprise computer become detectives after Scotty is accused of murdering women on a pleasure planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise is overrun by furry creatures while tangling with Klingons and bureaucrats.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk, Chekov, and Uhura are kidnapped and forced to participate in a series of gladiatorial games.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk investigates a planet with an Earth-like 1920's gangster culture.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters a gigantic energy draining space organism that threatens the galaxy.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk becomes involved in an arms race when the Klingons equip a native people with superior weaponry.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The U.S.S. Enterprise tracks a mysterious SOS to an ancient planet presumed long dead.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With the fate of Beacon Hills hanging in the balance, Scott and his pack face off against Douglas in a final showdown.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: As Scott readies Beacon Hills for his imminent departure, a mysterious presence breaks out of Eichen House.
programme.sub-title: Said The Spider To The Fly

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott and Malia search for the owner of a unique bullet, fearing that a new breed of werewolf hunter has come to Beacon Hills. At the same time, Lydia must face her own fears of Eichen House.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: While Scott and the others desperately pursue a missing werewolf, Melissa and Argent investigate the nature of a strange body.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott, Lydia and Malia have to take drastic measures to quell the growing violence in Beacon Hills, while Liam endures his own gauntlet at the high school.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: When Scott and the others try to protect two new werewolves, an unlikely ally joins the fight.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Liam and Theo attempt to draw the Hunters away from Beacon Hills.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: After a shocking attack leaves the pack reeling, Scott sets out to recruit reinforcements.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott and the others must make a discovery before it’s too late.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott and Malia prepare for battle while Argent searches for an old ally.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Gerard initiates his final attack on the Supernaturals of Beacon Hills.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: When teenager Scott McCall (Tyler Posey) is convinced by his best friend, Stiles (Dylan O'Brien), to join a search in the woods for a missing body, something comes out of the darkness to take a bite out of his side, changing his life forever.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Not aware that he has become a werewolf, Scott (Tyler Posey) must deal with hunters trying to catch him, another werewolf (Tyler Hoechlin) and the pressures of normal teen life, all while trying to get a second date with Allison (Crystal Reed).

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott's (Tyler Posey) first date with Allison (Crystal Reed) ends up in confusion and turns into a dreaded "group date." Meanwhile, a mystery animal attack has Sheriff Stilinski (Linden Ashby) and the rest of Beacon Hills on the lookout.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With his life in danger, Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) is forced to make reluctant allies out of Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien). While Scott tries to survive dinner with Allison's father (JR Bourne), Stiles attempts to keep Derek alive.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: A new animal attack raises more questions among authorities. And when Scott (Tyler Posey) and Allison (Crystal Reed) skip school unannounced, Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) must deal with the ever more aggressive werewolf hunters on his own.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) come up with ways for Scott to control the transformation in order to be with Allison (Crystal Reed), while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) attempts to make an ally of Scott in his battle with the hunters.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: When Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) is savagely attacked by the Alpha, Scott (Tyler Posey), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) and their friends find themselves trapped in Beacon Hills High School at night where they face both questions and suspicions about each other.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) on the run from Sheriff Stilinski (Linden Ashby), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) must help Scott (Tyler Posey) face his second full moon. Meanwhile, Jackson (Colton Haynes) tries to get closer to Allison (Crystal Reed).

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: Bette and Tina agree to forge a new relationship; Jenny worries that she may be fired from a writing gig when word gets out about her sexuality.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: Alice's bold sexual request stuns Dana. Jenny learns the truth about personal and professional matters. Bette and Tina have an intimate encounter.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: A Caribbean cruise proves eventful for Dana, Alice, Shane, Jenny and Carmen. Bette and Kit's estranged father visits them. Tina receives an award.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: Against the backdrop of a gay-pride parade, shocking secrets are revealed. Bette and Kit deal with their rapidly deteriorating father.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: Bette moves her father into her home for his final days. Dana's dinner with an ex sparks jealousy in Alice. Jenny engages in risky behavior.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: Melvin's funeral is attended by a surprise guest. Bette is blindsided by professional news and Tina faces a difficult labor. Jenny finally seeks help.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: Bette and Tina are back together and parenting Tina's newborn daughter, Angelica. Jenny, fed up with Midwest life, ponders moving back to Los Angeles.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: Jenny and Moira embark on an eventful road trip. Alice struggles with dependency on anti-depressants and Dana copes with finding a lump in her breast.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: Shane opens her own hair-styling business. Bette loses her job, forcing Tina to take work with Helena. Jenny and Moira arrive back in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: Bette travels to Washington D.C. to speak at a Senate hearing. Jenny puts her dreams of becoming a writer on hold and starts working as a waitress.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: Tina finds herself attracted to men online. Dana receives a cancer diagnosis and needs surgery. Moira goes out on the town as her male alter-ego Max.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: Tina to explores her feelings for men. Billie offers Moira testosterone drugs. Dana checks herself into the hospital to begin breast cancer treatment.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: In Vancouver, Tina explores her feelings for the opposite sex. In Los Angeles, Dana's cancer treatments take a toll. Moira begins hormone injections.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: Jenny plans an event to help Moira pay for surgery. The girls go on a trip to honor Dana's expected recovery. Bette kicks Tina out of the bedroom.

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: Tina goes on a date with a divorced man. Jenny throws a party for Max, but is appalled by their behavior. Helena's affair with Dylan takes a turn.
programme.sub-title: Lead, Follow Or Get Out Of The Way

programme.title: The L Word
programme.desc: Lara is still in Paris, oblivious to Dana's worsening health. Jenny introduces Max to her former boyfriend. Peggy helps Helena with Dylan's lawsuit.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca scores an invite to the Chan family Thanksgiving festivities, where Josh's parents fall in love with her much to Valencia's dismay. Meanwhile, Greg struggles with taking care of his dad and wanting to pursue his dreams.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca has a tough week after learning some news about Josh and someone surprising shows up to help her - Dr. Phil. Paula is pursued by an important new client Calvin and not just professionally.
programme.sub-title: I'm So Happy that Josh is So Happy!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: It is the holidays and Rebecca's mom decides to come visit her in West Covina. Old habits die hard and Rebecca, eager to please her mom, embellishes some facts about her life, which all comes crashing down at a local holiday event.
programme.sub-title: My Mom, Greg's Mom and Josh's Sweet Dance Moves!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress Josh's friend group, Rebecca rents a party bus to take the group to the beach. On the trip, Rebecca learns more about her new friends than she expected and makes a surprising revelation herself.
programme.sub-title: I'm Going to the Beach with Josh and His Friends!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Rebecca finds out Josh is a volunteer at a camp for at-risk teens, she realizes it is the perfect opportunity to remind Josh about the amazing times they had together at camp.
programme.sub-title: I'm Back at Camp with Josh!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca mistakenly sends Josh a text meant for Paula and takes drastic measures to ensure he never sees it. Meanwhile, Paula and her husband attempt to rekindle their relationship, only to be thwarted by Rebecca.
programme.sub-title: That Text Was Not Meant for Josh!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: After the texting debacle, Rebecca attempts to recover by pursuing a case she thinks will bring her closer to Josh. Darryl tries to reconcile his feelings for White Josh.
programme.sub-title: Josh and I Work on a Case!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca and Josh head to Los Angeles to present their case, which also forces them to confront their long buried feelings. Greg grapples with his feelings for Rebecca, while Darryl and White Josh continue to explore their newfound feelings.
programme.sub-title: Josh and I Go to Los Angeles!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca learns that Josh has conflicted feelings for her and Darryl wants to let everyone know about his newfound bisexuality. Meanwhile, Greg must figure out how to work alongside Heather post break-up.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca gets stuck on a plane with her therapist, who takes her on a surprising journey. Meanwhile, in West Covina, Josh, Paula, Darryl and even a reluctant Greg come together to find Rebecca.
programme.sub-title: Josh Has No Idea Where I am!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca is determined to get her life on track so when Josh's sister asks her to be a bridesmaid, Rebecca decides to use her role to make things right with Valencia. Paula cannot accept Rebecca's new mindset.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca is hiding a big secret from Paula, which begins to affect their friendship. Josh and Greg switch roles when Josh makes a discovery that angers him, while Greg is happier than he has been in a long time.
programme.sub-title: Why Is Josh in a Bad Mood?

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca's relationships are tested as she tries to navigate her friendship with Paula, her history with Josh and her connection with Greg. While at Josh's sister Jayma's wedding, Rebecca's world is turned upside down.
programme.sub-title: Paula Needs to Get Over Josh!

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca is convinced Josh is in love with her, while Greg is nowhere to be found. Paula is coming to terms with what drove her obsession with Rebecca's love life, while Darryl and White Josh try to navigate their new relationship.

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca desperately wants Josh to think she's cool so she tries to impress him with her sporty skills. Meanwhile, Greg is navigating his way through his new path, and is sorely tested by someone close to him.
programme.sub-title: When Will Josh See How Cool I Am?

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rebecca finds herself torn between two men. As the sign she is looking for is seemingly in front of her, she knows she's meant to choose Josh - or is it Greg? Paula finds herself also struggling with a big decision.
programme.sub-title: All Signs Point To Josh...Or Is It Josh's Friend?

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Heather comes to Rebecca's rescue after a major mishap and Rebecca attempts to reinvent herself. Paula is left to pick up the pieces at work and finds herself at a crossroads.
programme.sub-title: When Will Josh and His Friend Leave Me Alone?

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Rebecca forces Valencia to attend a festival with her, she finds she has more in common with Valencia than just Josh. Paula finds a new friend in Sunil, while Darryl learns something surprising about White Josh and ultimately, himself.
programme.sub-title: Why is Josh's Ex-Girlfriend Eating Carbs?

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Rebecca tries to host a girls' night with Paula, Heather, and Valencia, things don't go as planned. Meanwhile, Darryl bonds with co-worker Maya and discovers they have more in common than he realized.
programme.sub-title: Who Needs Josh When You Have a Girl Group?

programme.title: Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Rebecca and Valencia decide to investigate the new girl Anna that Josh has been dating, they discover way more than they bargained for. Paula, being pulled in different directions, feels disconnected from her husband Scott.
programme.sub-title: Who's the Cool Girl Josh is Dating?

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty and The Pod are sent to Phoenix to clean up a mess at a very powerful sports franchise caused by the impending divorce of its high-powered owners; Jeannie has dinner with an old flame but is deflated when she finds out his real intentions.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty is surprised when Greg Norbert and MetroCapital express interest in acquiring Galweather; the Pod flies to Indiana to consult for a beverage company, where Marty applies his management skills to turn a loss into a win.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty must bring his son Roscoe to his next job in San Francisco but ends up forced to babysit the teenage CEO of a security software company while Roscoe spends all his time with the Pod; newly engaged Jeannie has a tryst with a tortured musician.

programme.desc: After Chris tests poorly on a standard exam, his teacher, Ms. Morello, refers him to the school's guidance counselor, Mr. Abbott.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Caruso relinquishes his role as school bully after getting bullied himself. However, without Caruso to establish the school's power hierarchy and with everyone vying to fill his shoes, Chris and Greg realize they'd better come up with a fast solution.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Things take a literal turn for the worse when a license-less Chris volunteers to move his dad's car, but finds himself driving the car all the way to school as a result of trying to impress Tasha. Rochelle spends an interesting day at traffic court.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: As a result of their apartment being broken into, Julius and Rochelle decide it's a good idea to get a dog, something Chris has always wanted.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: With no extracurricular activities to his name, Chris decides to join the writing staff of the school newspaper.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: Flipper brings a sick dolphin to the Institute, placing the other dolphins at risk. Alex intends to release the sick dolphin back to the ocean.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: Holly and Alex find a Hispanic woman adrift on a life raft. She is suffering from amnesia, and the Immigration Department is keen to deport her.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: Courtney and Jackie help a young girl who is desperately trying to avoid an arranged marriage.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: When Courtney's father goes missing, she is forced to deal with some long-hiding feelings about him.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: Flipper is stranded in a tidal lagoon. As the tide recedes, Jackie falls ill, and Flipper's situation is revealed to her in a feverish nightmare.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: The new weekly series takes place in and around the Bal Harbor Institute, a marine mammal research facility set in the beautiful Florida Keys.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: A band of pirates attacks the yacht of Andre Slater, a wealthy lawyer. Forcing Slater off his boat, the pirates destroy it with an explosion.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: A shrimp trawler is cruising across the waves when an explosion suddenly rips it apart. Eco-terrorist Carl Moss, a.k.a. the "Green Freak" watches.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: As Flipper and his dolphin friend play, they fail to notice a fishing net in their midst. The net quickly snares Flipper's friend.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: An unscrupulous Cuban hotel owner, Miguel Hernandez and his partner Tyrell Parsons, an old college friend of Keith's, are planning to stage a dolphin show.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: Dejected by his new life in captivity, Flipper refuses to co-operate with the hotel's dolphin trainers, much to the annoyance of Tyrell and Hernandez.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: When Flipper helps Keith, Pam and Alex discover an illegal shark-finning line, the team finds several sharks hooked, bleeding and finless.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: Mike and Maya are sailboarding when they collide with a large piece of driftwood which plunges them both into the water. Mike resurfaces easily.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: Scott Blondel and his lawyer, Allison Sipes, are cruising the inlets of the Florida Keys when they spot Flipper.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: Keith and Mike are on a diving exercise with Flipper when believing a diver is being attacked by a moray eel

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: On a raft in the middle of the ocean sits a traumatized young teenager named Brooke McClintock. The lone survivor of a plane crash involving her.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: Flipper chatters away in the early morning outside Keith's bungalow. Keith wakes up to be led by the dolphin to the depths of a secluded coral.

programme.title: Flipper: The New Adventures
programme.desc: While at the seashore working on a fish feeder science project for school with Maya, Mike's instinct for procrastination takes over.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: To pacify their dateless state on Valentine's Day, the Jump Street squad plays poker and reminisces about their worst dates.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Hanson ends up being trapped inside an in-patient adolescent abuse center when he goes undercover to investigate reports of patient mistreatment.
programme.sub-title: Episode 15: I’m Ok, You Need Work

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Hanson stalks a ruthless killer to avenge the cold-blooded murder of his girlfriend.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Hanson and Pefihall pose as the battling McQuaid brothers to infiltrate a gang of students being bussed from the wrong side of the tracks.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Hanson poses as a bible-thumping student and befriends a teen whose strong faith almost costs him his life.
programme.sub-title: Episode 18: Brother Hanson & the Miracle of Renner’s Pond

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: The Jump Street gang may lose Judy Hoffs when she falls for a man on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Penhall is forced to remember his mother's suicide when a youth he's investigating kills himself.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: When a young murderer and his bride are busted at their wedding, a desperate groom takes Hoffs hostage.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: The Jump Street cops must find temporary jobs when school's out for summer, and maybe forever.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Hanson comes to blows with a new partner, officer Dennis Booker, whom he suspects is as bigoted as the gang of racists they're trying to bust.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: While Hanson and Booker try to catch a drug dealer, their investigation is impeded by a gang of young vigilantes committed to help clean the streets of crime.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: In this episode, Penhall and Booker examine the possible criminal negligence of his team's coach when his star linebacker is crippled for life.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Jump Street goes undercover on a college campus to investigate a rape on fraternity row.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street

programme.sub-title: Episode 7: The Dragon and the Angel

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: When the police union calls a strike, the Jump Street cops are torn over which side of the picket line to place their allegiance.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Hanson, Penhall, Booker, and loki pose as inmates in a juvenile lock-up to learn how heroin is entering the facility.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno's only means of saving himself and his brother is to break the psychological hold that Bracket's lies have over Mitch by reminding him of their past.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: By returning home to honor the one-year anniversary of his fiancee's death, Reno puts himself precariously close to Lt. Dixon's deadly clutches.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno may have met his match when Bobby sends him after a former heavyweight boxing champion turned convicted killer.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: When Reno attempts to bust his latest bounty at a railway station, the man slips from his grasp and the station, but not before stealing a car and killing the owner.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: When Reno attempts to bust an athletic beachcomber wanted for the armed robbery of a police van, he is blind sided by a female bounty hunter

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Armed robber Andy DuPree, has managed to allude authorities across the country and has once again returned to his hometown for his next round of scores.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: When a beautiful, young Mafia wife is framed for the murder of her husband, she fears for her life.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: When Reno tracks down assault and battery suspect Jason Calhoun, the head of a gang of surfers, he is immediately enthralled by the young man's charisma.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno and Bobby learn to never underestimate the power of a woman when they encounter a beautiful, young bail jumper.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: After tailing robber Nicky Griffin for two years, Bobby and Cheyenne are able to link the man and his proficient get-away drivers to the stock car racing circuit.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: When Reno learns of the escape of a convicted killer, he heads for Chicago to protect the arresting officer, his father, Police Sergeant Doug Raines

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: A distinguished municipal judge awakes after an intimate evening to find his 'date' murdered during the night.

programme.title: Renegade

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno is on the trail of small·tlme crook Tracy Hams

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno stirs up more than memories when he heads back to the location of his rookie beat to search for a reluctant gangbanger wanted for murder.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno tracks Hound Adams, the only man who can clear Reno's name, to a Carlsbad sports bar.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno's surprise reunion with Leeza Bendetti at Bobby's scenic Duck Lake cabin is soured when he stumbles upon a trio of drug dealers.

programme.title: Renegade

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Cheyenne convinces a reluctant Bobby to post bail and help prove the innocence of her unrequited love who has been arrested for the murder of his wife, Marily

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E9 - Out Of Their Minds
programme.desc: An alien ship fires a weapon at Moya. The blast makes it through and causes everyone's consciousness to jump into another body.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E9 - Out Of Their Minds

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E10 - My Three Crichtons
programme.desc: A strange globe appears on Moya, sucking in Crichton and duplicating him creating two additional people.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E10 - My Three Crichtons

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E11 - Look At The Princess, Part 1: A Kiss Is But A Kiss
programme.desc: On a planet about to crown its new monarch. The problem is the Princess cannot ascend unless she finds a genetically compatible mate.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E11 - Look At The Princess, Part 1: A Kiss Is But A Kiss

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E12 - Look At The Princess, Part 2: I Do, I Think
programme.desc: The Queen offers Crichton a choice; marry her daughter the crown princess, or she'll turn him over to Scorpius.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E12 - Look At The Princess, Part 2: I Do, I Think

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E13 - Look At The Princess, Part 3: The Maltese Crichton
programme.desc: John Crichton faces eighty years as a statue. That is, until the Scarran Cargn decapitates the statue and drops the head into a vat of acid.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E13 - Look At The Princess, Part 3: The Maltese Crichton

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E14 - Beware Of Dog
programme.desc: The crew bring aboard an alien tracker to remove some creatures that came aboard hidden in some cargo.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E14 - Beware Of Dog

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E15 - Won't Get Fooled Again
programme.desc: Crichton has returned to Earth. Or has he always been on Earth all this time? People from his past and present appear.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E15 - Won't Get Fooled Again

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E16 - The Locket
programme.desc: A temporal distortion traps Aeryn and John on a planet's surface, where they live out the rest of their lives.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E17 - The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: Crais and Talyn return. The crew are put on trial for an attack that Talyn made on an alien ship.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E17 - The Ugly Truth

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E18 - A Clockwork Nebari
programme.desc: A Nebari group comes aboard Moya and attempts to mind cleanse everyone using a drug. Pilot and Rygel are the only two who can resist the effects.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E18 - A Clockwork Nebari

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E19 - Liars, Guns And Money, Part 1: A Not So Simple Plan
programme.desc: D'Argo finally gets a lead on his son, Jothee. He will do anything to get him back, but Jothee will be sold as a slave.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E19 - Liars, Guns And Money, Part 1: A Not So Simple Plan

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E20 - Liars, Guns And Money, Part 2: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: With the loot from the Depository heist at hand, D'Argo anxiously waits to make contact with the Slave Traders.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E20 - Liars, Guns And Money, Part 2: With Friends Like These

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E21 - Liars, Guns And Money, Part 3: Plan B
programme.desc: The crew is going to break into the depository to free Crichton. Crichton is being tortured for wormhole technology.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E21 - Liars, Guns And Money, Part 3: Plan B

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E22 - Die Me, Dichotomy
programme.desc: Wealthy from their bank heist, Moya's crew heads straight to meet with Diagnosan Tocot, a famous surgeon whom they hope can heal Moya's burns.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E22 - Die Me, Dichotomy

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E1 - Season Of Death
programme.desc: D'Argo and Stark try to heal John, left with his head open on an operating table, while Scorpius attempts to avoid discovery.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S3 E1 - Season Of Death

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E2 - Suns And Lovers
programme.desc: Moya docks at a commerce station so the crew can spend some of their money. Disaster strikes when the station is hit by a storm.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S3 E2 - Suns And Lovers

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E3 - Self Inflicted Wounds, Part 1: Could'a, Would'a, Should'a
programme.desc: Moya approaches a wormhole, gets pulled in and fused to another ship.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S3 E3 - Self Inflicted Wounds, Part 1: Could'a, Would'a, Should'a

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E4 - Self Inflicted Wounds, Part 2: Wait For The Wheel
programme.desc: The crew works out a way of getting free from the other ship and out of the wormhole.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S3 E4 - Self Inflicted Wounds, Part 2: Wait For The Wheel

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E5 - Different Destinations
programme.desc: Stark accidentally sends himself, Crichton, Aeryn. D'Argo and Jool are back in time where they alter the timeline.
